name: Glenn Grothman
subject: QUICK request please!
body:
I need your help one last time this month. [](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ccnjd-yddjllujiu-r/) Fellow Patriot, Our campaign is up against a hard deadline, and we don't have any time to waste._**This Saturday is our FINAL chance to meet our July fundraising benchmarks, which will guide our campaign plans for next year.**_We want to make some critical investments in rapid response and digital voter outreach - to help in our race and our entire ticket in Wisconsin - but we're behind where we hoped to be this month. [JUNE 31 DEADLINE >>> CHIP IN NOW!](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ccnjd-yddjllujiu-y/) I am busy fighting against the radical socialist Democrat agenda in Washington.**That's why I need your support NOW, before it's too late for our country!** Every moment we spend trying to catch up with our fundraising deadline is a moment we can't focus on **DEFEATING** our common enemies: **ANARCHY and SOCIALISM!**[**Will you chip in $250, $100, $50, $25 or even just $10 NOW?**](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ccnjd-yddjllujiu-t/) With your help, we will get back on track to TAKE BACK THE MAJORITY and end the Democrat disaster in 2022.**Thanks for rushing your support!** -Glenn Grothman [CONFIRM YOUR SUPPORT >> CHIP IN NOW!](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ccnjd-yddjllujiu-i/) [](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ccnjd-yddjllujiu-d/) | Glenn Grothman for Congress
P.O. Box 1215
Fond du Lac, WI 54936 You are receiving this email because you expressed an interest in Glenn Grothman [Unsubscribe](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-u-ccnjd-yddjllujiu-h/)

name: Jamie Raskin
subject: this is important. don't delete.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | |
[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/aRwEBewGz~)
It's Jamie Raskin.

Earlier this year, I was proud to lead the efforts to hold Trump accountable for inciting the deadly insurrection against our Congress and our Constitution at the Capitol on January 6.

It was abundantly clear then, as it still is now -- **Donald Trump is unfit to hold power under the U.S. Constitution.**

So I was _outraged_ when I discovered he's already planning his return to power --_he even said he 's interested in becoming Speaker of the House of Representatives before he's our next President._

**Let me be clear: Donald Trump cannot be trusted with public office ever again, and I will do everything I can to stop him and his enablers in Congress.**

But I can't get the job done without strong grassroots support, and our Democrats are still a bit behind on our End of Month goal.

So at this crucial moment for our country, I'm asking you directly:

****[Will you send in $3 to defend our House Majority and ensure Trump and his Republicans never returns to power?](https://links.e.dccc.)** **

Our Democrats' critical End of Month Deadline is now just 24 hours away -- so your support has never been more important or more urgent. Can I count on you to defend our House Majority?
| | _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
| [**Chip in $1 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Chip in $35 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/V4_GFa_7g~)

Jamie Raskin

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45386317&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA0NzA1NTc3MQS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45386317&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA0NzA1NTc3MQS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

name: Tom Fitton
subject: CDC/Facebook Collusion on Censorship?
body:
Clean Elections THREATENED in Congress

[INSIDE JW]

CDC COORDINATED WITH FACEBOOK ON COVID MESSAGING AND
‘MISINFORMATION’

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56308&L=25480&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdmlkZW9zL2ZhY2Vib29rLWNvbGx1c2lvbi1taXNpbmZvcm1hdGlvbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA3MzEwMDEwMDM=]
Is it any wonder that Americans don’t trust the CDC
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56308&L=25477&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubnByLm9yZy8yMDIxLzA1LzEzLzk5NjMzMTY5Mi9wb2xsLWZpbmRzLXB1YmxpYy1oZWFsdGgtaGFzLWEtdHJ1c3QtcHJvYmxlbT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDczMTAwMTAwMw==]
or Facebook
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56308&L=25478&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucGV3cmVzZWFyY2gub3JnL2ZhY3QtdGFuay8yMDIxLzA2LzAxL2ZhY3RzLWFib3V0LWFtZXJpY2Fucy1hbmQtZmFjZWJvb2svP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNzMxMDAxMDAz]
to deliver accurate information? And is it any surprise that your
Judicial Watch caught these two organizations colluding to control the
flow of news and opinion about Covid-19?

We learned a lot about the behind the scenes, inappropriate friendship
of this government agency and this private company after we sued.

We received 2,469 pages
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56308&L=25458&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NkYy1jb3ZpZC1iaWctdGVjaC1qdWx5LTIwMjEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNzMxMDAxMDAz]
of
documents from the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC),
which reveal that Facebook coordinated closely with the CDC to control
the Covid narrative and “misinformation.”

In addition, social media companies gave more than $3.5 million in
free advertising to the CDC.

We received these documents in response to our Freedom of Information
Act (FOIA) (_Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Health of Human
Services_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56308&L=22331&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLWNkYy1zb2NpYWwtbWVkaWEtY29tcGxhaW50LTAwNjI1Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDczMTAwMTAwMw==]
(No.
1:21-cv-00625)) lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56308&L=22333&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvY2RjLWNvbW11bmljYXRpb25zLWJpZy10ZWNoLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDczMTAwMTAwMw==]
for:

Any and all records of communication between CDC officials and/or
employees and employees, agents, and/or representatives of Google,
Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, LinkedIn, and YouTube concerning,
regarding, or relating to COVID-19 related content on company
platforms. Such records include, but are not limited to, any advice
or instructions issued on disinformation re COVID-19.
The documents show little daylight between the CDC and Big Tech on
Covid-19 messaging and misinformation:

* In an email exchange beginning on January 26, 2020 with the
subject, “Data for Good | CDC intros,” a Facebook representative
sends the “FB coronavirus narrative” to the CDC.

It states the following
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56308&L=25459&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NkYy1jb3ZpZC1iaWctdGVjaC1qdWx5LTIwMjEtcGctNzY5L106P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNzMxMDAxMDAz

Facebook is taking a three pronged approached to the global response
for the coronavirus:

LIMIT MISINFORMATION AND OTHER HARMFUL CONTENT ON OUR
PLATFORMS. Our third-party fact-checkers have been rating
information on this topic as false, including
the AP, Politifact, AFP Hong Kong, Rapple IQ in the
Philippines. As a result, we show people who come across that false
content accurate information from our fact-checking partners and
strong warning labels. We also send notifications to people who
already shared this content alerting them that it’s been fact
checked.

PROVIDE ACCURATE AND HELPFUL INFORMATION ON OUR PLATFORMS TO OUR
PARTNERS. Partners are already using our platforms to share accurate
information about the situation, including on Pages. We have also
provided ad credits to the World Health Organization and the
Philippines’ Department of Health to enable them to run coronavirus
education campaigns on Facebook in-region, which we will continue to
do. We’re continuing to explore additional steps we can take,
including dedicated information modules on relevant search queries and
improved search ranking.

EMPOWER PARTNERS WITH DATA TOOLS. We’re sharing aggregated mobility
data and high resolution density maps with various partners (e.g.,
National Tsinghua University (Taiwan); Harvard School of Public
Health) to help inform forecasting models for the spread of the virus
as part of our broader Data for Good program. We’re exploring
doing this with a broader set of partners (e.g., WHO, US CDC) and also
helping partners understand how people are talking about the issue
online through tools like Crowdtangle to inform their efforts.
This email exchange continues
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56308&L=25460&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NkYy1jb3ZpZC1iaWctdGVjaC1qdWx5LTIwMjEtcGdzLTk1My05NzQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNzMxMDAxMDAz]
on
showing more coordination on messaging between the CDC and
Facebook.

* The CDC was given over $3.5 million of free advertising on
Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube.

* In a March 8, 2020 email
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56308&L=25461&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NkYy1jb3ZpZC1iaWctdGVjaC1qdWx5LTIwMjEtcGdzLTM1LTM2Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDczMTAwMTAwMw==],
a Facebook representative sends four ad credits totaling $2 million
to the CDC for the purpose of supporting “messaging related to
coronavirus.”

On March 14, 2020, then-CDC Chief Operating Officer and Chief Strategy
Officer Sherri Berger emails Facebook to thank them for the $2
million.

“On behalf of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC)
and by the authority delegated to me through Section 231 of the Public
Health Service Act (42 U.S.C. Section 238), as amended, thank you for
Facebook’s non-monetary gift of advertising credited with an
estimated value of $2,000,000. The gift will be used by CDC’s
COVID-19 response to support dissemination of critical public health
messaging. Thank you!”

* In an email exchange
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56308&L=25464&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NkYy1jb3ZpZC1iaWctdGVjaC1qdWx5LTIwMjEtcGctMjQ2Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDczMTAwMTAwMw==]
between
August 10-11, 2020, the CDC’s Sherri Berger emails Facebook again to
thank them for another $1 million in ad credits with a similar message
to that on March 14, except she adds: “This gift will be used by
the CDC’s COVID-19 response to distribute scientifically accurate
data, guidance and risk communication information on COVID-19 to a
broader audience.” In an email exchange
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56308&L=25465&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NkYy1jb3ZpZC1iaWctdGVjaC1qdWx5LTIwMjEtcGdzLTQxMS00MTIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNzMxMDAxMDAz]
on
August 25, 2020, Facebook makes CDC officials aware that of their
recent gift of $1 million in ad credits, $529,207.42 remain.
* In a heavily redacted email exchange
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56308&L=25466&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NkYy1jb3ZpZC1iaWctdGVjaC1qdWx5LTIwMjEtcGctMTc2MS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA3MzEwMDEwMDM=]
on
March 17, 2020, a Twitter official offers the CDC advertising in the
form of Twitter’s Promoted Trend and Promoted Spotlight Trend,
which have approximate values given as $75,000 and $150,000.
* In an email exchange
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56308&L=25467&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NkYy1jb3ZpZC1iaWctdGVjaC1qdWx5LTIwMjEtcGdzLTI0NTQtMjQ2Mi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA3MzEwMDEwMDM=]
beginning
March 16, 2020, a Google representative offers the CDC free video
advertising on YouTube. In the exchange, they claim to not be able
to assign a dollar value to this advertising. The CDC’s official
acceptance document for this advertising, which they value at $0,
Sherri Berger states
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56308&L=25468&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NkYy1jb3ZpZC1iaWctdGVjaC1qdWx5LTIwMjEtcGdzLTI0NTUtMjQ1NS9dOj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDczMTAwMTAwMw==
I understand that Google LLC may be a vendor and/or lobbyist employed
and that Google LLC’s employees may be registered
lobbyists. Providing the gift will not prevent Google LLC or its
affiliates from supplying products of services to CDC in the future;
CDC, however, is under no obligation to accept future services from
Google LLC or its affiliates.
* In a February 27, 2020 email, a Facebook representative offers to
put CDC officials in contact with WhatsApp in order to establish
auto-responses to FAQs about coronavirus in that communications
platform.

These documents show that Facebook and the CDC are joined at the hip
on managing the ever-changing Covid-19 “narrative” – which
includes censorship of alleged “misinformation.”

I suspect there is more to be found on this topic and Judicial
Watch’s investigators and litigators will continue to expose the
behind-the-scenes censorious machinations between Big Government and
Big Tech that are a threat to both the truth and your First
Amendment rights.

CHICAGO MAYOR SAYS SHE WOULD “ABSOLUTELY” DISCRIMINATE AGAINST
WHITE REPORTERS AGAIN

In-your-face racism continues in the Chicago mayor’s office.

We filed an amended complaint
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56308&L=25445&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NhdGVuYWNjaS1ldC1hbC12LWxpZ2h0Zm9vdC1hbWVuZGVkLWNvbXBsYWludC0wMjg1Mi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA3MzEwMDEwMDM=]
in
our lawsuit on behalf of the Daily Caller News Foundation and
reporter Thomas Catenacci against Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot for
violating their First Amendment rights and Catenacci’s right to
equal protection under the Fourteenth Amendment.

We sued in the United States District Court for the Northern District
of Illinois, Eastern Division, after Catenacci, a white male, emailed
Lightfoot’s office requesting a one-on-one interview with the mayor
and the office failed to reply to the request or Catenacci’s two
additional follow-up emails (_Catenacci et al v. Lightfoot _
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56308&L=25479&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvbGlnaHRmb290X2NvbXBsYWludC9dKE5vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNzMxMDAxMDAz.
1:21-cv-02852)). Christine Svenson of Svenson Law Offices in Palatine,
Illinois, is assisting us with the lawsuit.

Mayor Lightfoot discriminated against journalists based on their race.
We repeatedly requested that Lightfoot sign a consent decree agreeing
not to use race-based criteria for interview requests for the
remainder of her time in office. Not only did her lawyers ignore these
requests, in a recent interview, an unrepentant Lightfoot told
a _New York Times_ writer
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56308&L=25446&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubnl0aW1lcy5jb20vMjAyMS8wNy8yNi9vcGluaW9uL3N3YXkta2FyYS1maXNoZXItbG9yaS1saWdodGZvb3QuaHRtbD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDczMTAwMTAwMw==],
“I would absolutely do it again. I’m unapologetic about it because
it spurred a very important conversation, a conversation that needed
to happen, that should have happened a long time ago.”

“I cannot believe that Mayor Lightfoot told the _New York
Times_ reporter that she would absolutely discriminate against
reporters again based on their race,” said Thomas Catenacci. “If
she isn’t stopped, what’s next?”

“A policy of granting interviews based on the color of a
reporter’s skin isn’t merely discriminatory, it undercuts the
foundational principles of freedom of the press,” said DCNF acting
editor in chief Thomas Phippen. “That Mayor Lightfoot is
‘unapologetic’ about her policy speaks volumes.”

In May, Lightfoot’s office informed multiple reporters that she
would grant one-on-one interviews, “only to Black or Brown
journalists
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56308&L=24997&F=T&
The next day, the mayor released a letter
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56308&L=24998&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL21heW9yLWxpZ2h0Zm9vdC1qb3VybmFsaXN0cy0yMDIxLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDczMTAwMTAwMw==]
doubling
down on her discriminatory policy.

Our amended complaint
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56308&L=25445&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NhdGVuYWNjaS1ldC1hbC12LWxpZ2h0Zm9vdC1hbWVuZGVkLWNvbXBsYWludC0wMjg1Mi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA3MzEwMDEwMDM=]
explains:

On May 18, 2021, a Chicago reporter tweeted that Mayor Lightfoot’s
spokesperson informed her that the mayor “is granting 1 on 1
interviews – only to Black or Brown journalists.” Mayor Lightfoot
subsequently released a letter stating, “By now, you have heard the
news that on the occasion of the two-year anniversary of my
inauguration as Mayor of this great City, I will be exclusively
providing one-on-one interviews with journalists of color.” Neither
Mayor Lightfoot nor her spokesperson suggested that the mayor’s new,
race-based interview policy was not permanent or identified any time
limit on how long the mayor intended to use race-based criteria for
granting interview requests.
Lightfoot’s communications director testified
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56308&L=25134&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvc3dvcm4tY291cnQtZmlsaW5nLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDczMTAwMTAwMw==]
that
the mayor used race-based criteria for granting interview requests for
two days, May 19 and 20, and did not grant any interview requests to
White reporters. Moreover, the mayor’s office has yet to respond to
Catenacci’s request nor has the mayor agreed to an interview with
him. Mayor Lightfoot’s response to the lawsuit is due by August 2,
2021, so stay tuned for updates soon.

SENIOR JUDICIAL WATCH ATTORNEY RUSSELL NOBILE TESTIFIES TO CONGRESS ON
VOTING RIGHTS ACT

We are the leader in issues of election integrity and are educating
Congress through witness testimony by our leading experts in the field
of election law.

Senior Attorney Russell Nobile testified before the House Subcommittee
on the Constitution, Civil Rights, and Civil Liberties in a hearing
titled, “The Need to Enhance the Voting Rights Act: Practice-Based
Coverage.” (This is Russ’s third appearance before Congress in
recent weeks!)

You can watch the hearing on our website
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56308&L=25453&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9qdWRpY2lhcnkuaG91c2UuZ292L2NhbGVuZGFyL2V2ZW50c2luZ2xlLmFzcHg/RXZlbnRJRD00NjUxJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNzMxMDAxMDAz].

In his testimony, he focused on new legislative efforts by Democrats
in Congress that would effectively result in a federal takeover of
election management and empower the Justice Department to veto voter
ID and other widely used election integrity measures.

>From 2006 to 2012, Nobile worked as a trial attorney in the Department
of Justice’s Civil Rights Division’s Voting Section, which is
responsible for enforcing all provisions of the Voting Rights Act of
1965, the National Voter Registration Act of 1993, and the Uniformed
and Overseas Citizens Absentee Voting Act.

Judicial Watch attorneys Robert Popper
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56308&L=25454&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1vSmNOWTF3cUZzRSZ0PTUxNHMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA3MzEwMDEwMDM=]
and Russell
Nobile
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56308&L=25455&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj00SGQ1UzdTeE54byZ0PTI4MTVzJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNzMxMDAxMDAz]
addressed the
two houses of Congress on the importance of maintaining and protecting
strong election security measures and have previously testified before
both the U.S. House Judiciary Committee’s Subcommittee on the
Constitution, Civil Rights, and Civil Liberties
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56308&L=25454&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1vSmNOWTF3cUZzRSZ0PTUxNHMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA3MzEwMDEwMDM=]
and the U.S.
Senate Judiciary Committee’s Subcommittee on the Constitution
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56308&L=25455&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj00SGQ1UzdTeE54byZ0PTI4MTVzJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNzMxMDAxMDAz].

BIG WIN AT SUPREME COURT SIGNALS ELECTION BATTLES AHEAD

If Americans can’t trust the outcome of elections, where are we? Our
chief investigative correspondent, Micah Morrison, explains
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56308&L=25448&F=T&]
the high-stakes battles in his _Investigative Bulletin_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56308&L=25448&F=T&].

Judicial Watch experts were up on Capitol Hill earlier this month
explaining the implications of a big 6-3 Supreme Court ruling in the
fierce battle for clean elections. The immediate issues
in _Brnovich_, _Attorney General of Arizona, v. Democratic National
Committee et al_ revolved around out-of-precinct voting and ballot
harvesting. Should the Arizona practices be banned?

But both sides are hunting bigger game in the high-stakes case:
Section Two of the Voting Rights Act. The standards set
in _Brnovich_ will impact a wide array of hot-button state election
issues around the nation, including redistricting, voter ID, mail-in
ballots, same-day registration, proof required for registration, early
voting, third-party collection of ballots, and when polls can close on
election day.

Reacting to the July 1 High Court ruling
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56308&L=25378&F=T&],
Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton called it “a home run for
cleaner elections, reaffirming that states may take action to prevent
election fraud without waiting for it to occur within their own
borders. This new decision rightly rejects the race baiting of the
leftist partisans who pretend that neutral provisions to combat voter
fraud (such as voter ID and bans on ballot harvesting) are
presumptively racist.”

The Left went bonkers over _Brnovich_. President Biden called it a
“broad assault against voting rights.” The New York Times
editorial board said it was an “attack on democracy.” A Washington
Post columnist said the decision leaves “voters of color
increasingly vulnerable to efforts to exclude them from our
democracy.”

Testifying before Capitol Hill committees two weeks later, Judicial
Watch experts set the record straight. Judicial Watch Election
Integrity Project Director Robert Popper condemned the “outrageous
hyperbole” of critics of the _Brnovich_ decision.

Popper noted that Section Two of the Voting Rights Act had given the
rise in recent years to extreme lawsuits challenging
“ordinary-seeming regulations—and changes to such
regulations—governing, for example, the use of absentee ballots,
in-precinct voting, early voting, voter ID laws, election observers
same-day registration, durational residency requirements, and
straight-ticket voting.” In a less highly charged political time,
Popper noted, the 2005 bipartisan Carter-Baker Commission Report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56308&L=25443&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9tb3JpdHpsYXcub3N1LmVkdS9lbGVjdGlvbmxhdy9saXRpZ2F0aW9uL2RvY3VtZW50cy9WZWFzZXk3ODQ4LnBkZj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDczMTAwMTAwMw==]
“had
expressly noted the need for such regulations, including those
regarding absentee ballots, out-of-precinct voting, early voting,
in-person ID requirements, and election observers.”

One example of Section Two abuse? In the _Husted_ case
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56308&L=25444&F=T&],
a district court ruled that an Ohio law decreasing the early voting
period from 35 to 29 days violated the Voting Rights Act because the
change interacted with “historical and social conditions”
afflicting minority voters.

The Sixth Circuit Court of Appeals reversed the decision. It noted
that the loss of one week of early voting was, at worst, a minor
contraction of “one of the many conveniences that have generously
facilitated voting participation in Ohio.” The appeals court also
noted that thirteen states did not “permit any early in-person
voting days.”

The Carter-Baker Commission recommendations and _Husted_ are
examples that should be kept in mind when assessing the hyperbole from
the Left surrounding _Brnovich_ and current challenges to election
regulations, Popper noted.

Popper told Congress: “One hears—and large news outlets dutifully
report— that there is a ‘tsunami’ of legislation ‘restricting
the right to vote,’ that states reforming their mail-in voting laws
as COVID retreats are engaged in ‘voter suppression,’ and even
that these actions represent ‘the new Jim Crow.’ These claims are
preposterous. At best, they reveal a startling historical ignorance.
The grandfather laws, absurd literacy tests, poll taxes, intimidation
and terroristic violence of the Jim Crow era have nothing whatever to
do with, say, Ohio’s restriction of early voting from 35 to 29 days,
or with limiting same-day registration. Nor do they have anything to
do with regulating absentee ballots, out-of-precinct voting, or voter
ID requirements, all reasonable electoral integrity measures approved
by the Carter-Baker Commission. At worst these statements reveal a
startling cynicism, driven by a desire to inflame passions—and to
raise funds.”

Popper testified before a House Judiciary Committee subcommittee on
July 16. Two days earlier, Judicial Watch Senior Attorney Russell
Nobile spoke to a Senate subcommittee. Looking ahead, both men warned
of trouble in the post-_Brnovich_ landscape.

“In particular,” Popper noted, the Democrats’ top election bill
priority in Congress—HR 4, the John Lewis Voting Rights Act—“is
a bad idea.” It gives the attorney general “new, unchecked
power” to sue directly for violations of the Constitution. The new
powers likely would be centered in the Voting Section of the Civil
Rights Division of the Justice Department which, Popper warned, “has
in the past proved to be a hotbed of partisanship.”

Russell Nobile noted in his Senate testimony that the “truth is that
HR 4 goes far beyond any civil rights law enacted during the height of
the civil rights era. Rather, it is part of a grander plan to shift
control of American elections away from individual state legislatures
and into the hands of a single federal bureaucratic department.” You
can read more from Nobile on HR 4 and the looming election integrity
crisis in this Judicial Watch report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56308&L=25136&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW52ZXN0aWdhdGl2ZS1idWxsZXRpbi9qdWRpY2lhbC13YXRjaC13YXJucy1vZi1lbGVjdGlvbi1pbnRlZ3JpdHktY3Jpc2lzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDczMTAwMTAwMw==].

Nobile also noted problems at the Voting Section of the Civil Rights
Division of the Justice Department, where both he and Popper served
earlier in their careers. Citing the recent “tremendous debate”
over Critical Race Theory (CRT)—the Marxism-rooted ideology
insisting that American democracy is suffused to its core by racism
and must be dismantled—Nobile said that “there are few places in
the federal government that are more dominated by the assumptions that
underlie CRT. The partisanship and hostility towards staff that do not
share the same assumptions is startling” and includes, from some,
“a shocking level of intolerance.”

Nobile warns that even within highly political Washington, “the
culture of the Voting Section stands out for its partisanship. Any
legislation that shifts greater federal power to the Department’s
Voting Section will make elections worse, not better.”

Read Robert Popper’s statement to the House Judiciary Committee’s
Subcommittee on the Constitution, Civil Rights, and Civil
Liberties here
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56308&L=25366&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3BvcHBlci12cmEtaG91c2UtdGVzdGltb255LWp1bHktMjAyMS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA3MzEwMDEwMDM=].

Read Russell Nobile’s statement to the Senate Judiciary
Committee’s Subcommittee on the Constitution here
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56308&L=25369&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL25vYmlsZS1qdWx5LTIwMjEtdnJhLXNlbmF0ZS10ZXN0aW1vbnkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNzMxMDAxMDAz].

Until next week,

clean_body: Clean Elections THREATENED in Congress [INSIDE JW] CDC COORDINATED WITH FACEBOOK ON COVID MESSAGING AND ‘MISINFORMATION’ [=] Is it any wonder that Americans don’t trust the CDC [==] or Facebook [] to deliver accurate information? And is it any surprise that your Judicial Watch caught these two organizations colluding to control the flow of news and opinion about Covid-19? We learned a lot about the behind the scenes, inappropriate friendship of this government agency and this private company after we sued. We received 2,469 pages [] of documents from the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC), which reveal that Facebook coordinated closely with the CDC to control the Covid narrative and “misinformation.” In addition, social media companies gave more than $3.5 million in free advertising to the CDC. We received these documents in response to our Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Health of Human Services [==] (No. 1:21-cv-00625)) lawsuit [==] for: Any and all records of communication between CDC officials and/or employees and employees, agents, and/or representatives of Google, Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, LinkedIn, and YouTube concerning, regarding, or relating to COVID-19 related content on company platforms. Such records include, but are not limited to, any advice or instructions issued on disinformation re COVID-19. The documents show little daylight between the CDC and Big Tech on Covid-19 messaging and misinformation: In an email exchange beginning on January 26, 2020 with the subject, “Data for Good | CDC intros,” a Facebook representative sends the “FB coronavirus narrative” to the CDC. It states the following [ Facebook is taking a three pronged approached to the global response for the coronavirus: LIMIT MISINFORMATION AND OTHER HARMFUL CONTENT ON OUR PLATFORMS. Our third-party fact-checkers have been rating information on this topic as false, including the AP, Politifact, AFP Hong Kong, Rapple IQ in the Philippines. As a result, we show people who come across that false content accurate information from our fact-checking partners and strong warning labels. We also send notifications to people who already shared this content alerting them that it’s been fact checked. PROVIDE ACCURATE AND HELPFUL INFORMATION ON OUR PLATFORMS TO OUR PARTNERS. Partners are already using our platforms to share accurate information about the situation, including on Pages. We have also provided ad credits to the World Health Organization and the Philippines’ Department of Health to enable them to run coronavirus education campaigns on Facebook in-region, which we will continue to do. We’re continuing to explore additional steps we can take, including dedicated information modules on relevant search queries and improved search ranking. EMPOWER PARTNERS WITH DATA TOOLS. We’re sharing aggregated mobility data and high resolution density maps with various partners (e.g., National Tsinghua University (Taiwan); Harvard School of Public Health) to help inform forecasting models for the spread of the virus as part of our broader Data for Good program. We’re exploring doing this with a broader set of partners (e.g., WHO, US CDC) and also helping partners understand how people are talking about the issue online through tools like Crowdtangle to inform their efforts. This email exchange continues [] on showing more coordination on messaging between the CDC and Facebook. The CDC was given over $3.5 million of free advertising on Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube. In a March 8, 2020 email [==], a Facebook representative sends four ad credits totaling $2 million to the CDC for the purpose of supporting “messaging related to coronavirus.” On March 14, 2020, then-CDC Chief Operating Officer and Chief Strategy Officer Sherri Berger emails Facebook to thank them for the $2 million. “On behalf of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) and by the authority delegated to me through Section 231 of the Public Health Service Act (42 U.S.C. Section 238), as amended, thank you for Facebook’s non-monetary gift of advertising credited with an estimated value of $2,000,000. The gift will be used by CDC’s COVID-19 response to support dissemination of critical public health messaging. Thank you!” In an email exchange [==] between August 10-11, 2020, the CDC’s Sherri Berger emails Facebook again to thank them for another $1 million in ad credits with a similar message to that on March 14, except she adds: “This gift will be used by the CDC’s COVID-19 response to distribute scientifically accurate data, guidance and risk communication information on COVID-19 to a broader audience.” In an email exchange [] on August 25, 2020, Facebook makes CDC officials aware that of their recent gift of $1 million in ad credits, $529,207.42 remain. In a heavily redacted email exchange [=] on March 17, 2020, a Twitter official offers the CDC advertising in the form of Twitter’s Promoted Trend and Promoted Spotlight Trend, which have approximate values given as $75,000 and $150,000. In an email exchange [=] beginning March 16, 2020, a Google representative offers the CDC free video advertising on YouTube. In the exchange, they claim to not be able to assign a dollar value to this advertising. The CDC’s official acceptance document for this advertising, which they value at $0, Sherri Berger states [== I understand that Google LLC may be a vendor and/or lobbyist employed and that Google LLC’s employees may be registered lobbyists. Providing the gift will not prevent Google LLC or its affiliates from supplying products of services to CDC in the future; CDC, however, is under no obligation to accept future services from Google LLC or its affiliates. * In a February 27, 2020 email, a Facebook representative offers to put CDC officials in contact with WhatsApp in order to establish auto-responses to FAQs about coronavirus in that communications platform. These documents show that Facebook and the CDC are joined at the hip on managing the ever-changing Covid-19 “narrative” – which includes censorship of alleged “misinformation.” I suspect there is more to be found on this topic and Judicial Watch’s investigators and litigators will continue to expose the behind-the-scenes censorious machinations between Big Government and Big Tech that are a threat to both the truth and your First Amendment rights. CHICAGO MAYOR SAYS SHE WOULD “ABSOLUTELY” DISCRIMINATE AGAINST WHITE REPORTERS AGAIN In-your-face racism continues in the Chicago mayor’s office. We filed an amended complaint [=] in our lawsuit on behalf of the Daily Caller News Foundation and reporter Thomas Catenacci against Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot for violating their First Amendment rights and Catenacci’s right to equal protection under the Fourteenth Amendment. We sued in the United States District Court for the Northern District of Illinois, Eastern Division, after Catenacci, a white male, emailed Lightfoot’s office requesting a one-on-one interview with the mayor and the office failed to reply to the request or Catenacci’s two additional follow-up emails (Catenacci et al v. Lightfoot [. 1:21-cv-02852)). Christine Svenson of Svenson Law Offices in Palatine, Illinois, is assisting us with the lawsuit. Mayor Lightfoot discriminated against journalists based on their race. We repeatedly requested that Lightfoot sign a consent decree agreeing not to use race-based criteria for interview requests for the remainder of her time in office. Not only did her lawyers ignore these requests, in a recent interview, an unrepentant Lightfoot told a New York Times writer [==], “I would absolutely do it again. I’m unapologetic about it because it spurred a very important conversation, a conversation that needed to happen, that should have happened a long time ago.” “I cannot believe that Mayor Lightfoot told the New York Times reporter that she would absolutely discriminate against reporters again based on their race,” said Thomas Catenacci. “If she isn’t stopped, what’s next?” “A policy of granting interviews based on the color of a reporter’s skin isn’t merely discriminatory, it undercuts the foundational principles of freedom of the press,” said DCNF acting editor in chief Thomas Phippen. “That Mayor Lightfoot is ‘unapologetic’ about her policy speaks volumes.” In May, Lightfoot’s office informed multiple reporters that she would grant one-on-one interviews, “only to Black or Brown journalists [= The next day, the mayor released a letter [==] doubling down on her discriminatory policy. Our amended complaint [=] explains: On May 18, 2021, a Chicago reporter tweeted that Mayor Lightfoot’s spokesperson informed her that the mayor “is granting 1 on 1 interviews – only to Black or Brown journalists.” Mayor Lightfoot subsequently released a letter stating, “By now, you have heard the news that on the occasion of the two-year anniversary of my inauguration as Mayor of this great City, I will be exclusively providing one-on-one interviews with journalists of color.” Neither Mayor Lightfoot nor her spokesperson suggested that the mayor’s new, race-based interview policy was not permanent or identified any time limit on how long the mayor intended to use race-based criteria for granting interview requests. Lightfoot’s communications director testified [==] that the mayor used race-based criteria for granting interview requests for two days, May 19 and 20, and did not grant any interview requests to White reporters. Moreover, the mayor’s office has yet to respond to Catenacci’s request nor has the mayor agreed to an interview with him. Mayor Lightfoot’s response to the lawsuit is due by August 2, 2021, so stay tuned for updates soon. SENIOR JUDICIAL WATCH ATTORNEY RUSSELL NOBILE TESTIFIES TO CONGRESS ON VOTING RIGHTS ACT We are the leader in issues of election integrity and are educating Congress through witness testimony by our leading experts in the field of election law. Senior Attorney Russell Nobile testified before the House Subcommittee on the Constitution, Civil Rights, and Civil Liberties in a hearing titled, “The Need to Enhance the Voting Rights Act: Practice-Based Coverage.” (This is Russ’s third appearance before Congress in recent weeks!) You can watch the hearing on our website []. In his testimony, he focused on new legislative efforts by Democrats in Congress that would effectively result in a federal takeover of election management and empower the Justice Department to veto voter ID and other widely used election integrity measures. From 2006 to 2012, Nobile worked as a trial attorney in the Department of Justice’s Civil Rights Division’s Voting Section, which is responsible for enforcing all provisions of the Voting Rights Act of 1965, the National Voter Registration Act of 1993, and the Uniformed and Overseas Citizens Absentee Voting Act. Judicial Watch attorneys Robert Popper [=] and Russell Nobile [] addressed the two houses of Congress on the importance of maintaining and protecting strong election security measures and have previously testified before both the U.S. House Judiciary Committee’s Subcommittee on the Constitution, Civil Rights, and Civil Liberties [=] and the U.S. Senate Judiciary Committee’s Subcommittee on the Constitution []. BIG WIN AT SUPREME COURT SIGNALS ELECTION BATTLES AHEAD If Americans can’t trust the outcome of elections, where are we? Our chief investigative correspondent, Micah Morrison, explains [=] the high-stakes battles in his Investigative Bulletin [=]. Judicial Watch experts were up on Capitol Hill earlier this month explaining the implications of a big 6-3 Supreme Court ruling in the fierce battle for clean elections. The immediate issues in Brnovich, Attorney General of Arizona, v. Democratic National Committee et al revolved around out-of-precinct voting and ballot harvesting. Should the Arizona practices be banned? But both sides are hunting bigger game in the high-stakes case: Section Two of the Voting Rights Act. The standards set in Brnovich will impact a wide array of hot-button state election issues around the nation, including redistricting, voter ID, mail-in ballots, same-day registration, proof required for registration, early voting, third-party collection of ballots, and when polls can close on election day. Reacting to the July 1 High Court ruling [==], Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton called it “a home run for cleaner elections, reaffirming that states may take action to prevent election fraud without waiting for it to occur within their own borders. This new decision rightly rejects the race baiting of the leftist partisans who pretend that neutral provisions to combat voter fraud (such as voter ID and bans on ballot harvesting) are presumptively racist.” The Left went bonkers over Brnovich. President Biden called it a “broad assault against voting rights.” The New York Times editorial board said it was an “attack on democracy.” A Washington Post columnist said the decision leaves “voters of color increasingly vulnerable to efforts to exclude them from our democracy.” Testifying before Capitol Hill committees two weeks later, Judicial Watch experts set the record straight. Judicial Watch Election Integrity Project Director Robert Popper condemned the “outrageous hyperbole” of critics of the Brnovich decision. Popper noted that Section Two of the Voting Rights Act had given the rise in recent years to extreme lawsuits challenging “ordinary-seeming regulations—and changes to such regulations—governing, for example, the use of absentee ballots, in-precinct voting, early voting, voter ID laws, election observers same-day registration, durational residency requirements, and straight-ticket voting.” In a less highly charged political time, Popper noted, the 2005 bipartisan Carter-Baker Commission Report [==] “had expressly noted the need for such regulations, including those regarding absentee ballots, out-of-precinct voting, early voting, in-person ID requirements, and election observers.” One example of Section Two abuse? In the Husted case [==], a district court ruled that an Ohio law decreasing the early voting period from 35 to 29 days violated the Voting Rights Act because the change interacted with “historical and social conditions” afflicting minority voters. The Sixth Circuit Court of Appeals reversed the decision. It noted that the loss of one week of early voting was, at worst, a minor contraction of “one of the many conveniences that have generously facilitated voting participation in Ohio.” The appeals court also noted that thirteen states did not “permit any early in-person voting days.” The Carter-Baker Commission recommendations and Husted are examples that should be kept in mind when assessing the hyperbole from the Left surrounding Brnovich and current challenges to election regulations, Popper noted. Popper told Congress: “One hears—and large news outlets dutifully report— that there is a ‘tsunami’ of legislation ‘restricting the right to vote,’ that states reforming their mail-in voting laws as COVID retreats are engaged in ‘voter suppression,’ and even that these actions represent ‘the new Jim Crow.’ These claims are preposterous. At best, they reveal a startling historical ignorance. The grandfather laws, absurd literacy tests, poll taxes, intimidation and terroristic violence of the Jim Crow era have nothing whatever to do with, say, Ohio’s restriction of early voting from 35 to 29 days, or with limiting same-day registration. Nor do they have anything to do with regulating absentee ballots, out-of-precinct voting, or voter ID requirements, all reasonable electoral integrity measures approved by the Carter-Baker Commission. At worst these statements reveal a startling cynicism, driven by a desire to inflame passions—and to raise funds.” Popper testified before a House Judiciary Committee subcommittee on July 16. Two days earlier, Judicial Watch Senior Attorney Russell Nobile spoke to a Senate subcommittee. Looking ahead, both men warned of trouble in the post-Brnovich landscape. “In particular,” Popper noted, the Democrats’ top election bill priority in Congress—HR 4, the John Lewis Voting Rights Act—“is a bad idea.” It gives the attorney general “new, unchecked power” to sue directly for violations of the Constitution. The new powers likely would be centered in the Voting Section of the Civil Rights Division of the Justice Department which, Popper warned, “has in the past proved to be a hotbed of partisanship.” Russell Nobile noted in his Senate testimony that the “truth is that HR 4 goes far beyond any civil rights law enacted during the height of the civil rights era. Rather, it is part of a grander plan to shift control of American elections away from individual state legislatures and into the hands of a single federal bureaucratic department.” You can read more from Nobile on HR 4 and the looming election integrity crisis in this Judicial Watch report [==]. Nobile also noted problems at the Voting Section of the Civil Rights Division of the Justice Department, where both he and Popper served earlier in their careers. Citing the recent “tremendous debate” over Critical Race Theory (CRT)—the Marxism-rooted ideology insisting that American democracy is suffused to its core by racism and must be dismantled—Nobile said that “there are few places in the federal government that are more dominated by the assumptions that underlie CRT. The partisanship and hostility towards staff that do not share the same assumptions is startling” and includes, from some, “a shocking level of intolerance.” Nobile warns that even within highly political Washington, “the culture of the Voting Section stands out for its partisanship. Any legislation that shifts greater federal power to the Department’s Voting Section will make elections worse, not better.” Read Robert Popper’s statement to the House Judiciary Committee’s Subcommittee on the Constitution, Civil Rights, and Civil Liberties here [=]. Read Russell Nobile’s statement to the Senate Judiciary Committee’s Subcommittee on the Constitution here []. Until next week, [Contribute] [] [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [==] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2021, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

Derek, I need your help to send a message. Because frankly, I’m about to lose my damn voice!

I’ve been making headlines lately for getting a little riled up -- okay, for outright shouting -- at my GOP colleagues on the House floor.

Because when it comes to speaking up for our workers and our democracy, I’m never going to hold my tongue. But our campaign’s end-of-month deadline is tomorrow night, and I need YOUR help to let the country know that I’m not standing on my own.

[**Our fundraising numbers need to show that I’ve got a grassroots army behind me ready to flip this Senate seat so that we can start getting big things done for the American people. So Derek, will you split a few bucks between my campaign and Common Good VA to help us reach our critical end-of-month goal before the clock runs out?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7Xq7OWWhVN4JthAGeGYAwAwma4hSXMwRjsV2o1_Ex0X8YF9iWAH7K2RhA_spb5J79_RPo1iNlQ7QNcbS69LgMVzJCGSAEFNFel3KUFETRk6w55vtmFdauUBxFdqq9eMri9otopTL7dG44enLGED2lIoZt2WMNfvTagVQsMUpgDoL9xLf4z7CD68BFaXLqA22VdqTk1Eo4DT6JbQKDvOrEjCgQJhM1oab6GkasZY1kp8LpX440sU27Kjbv3s6l4Cv53TYQV5mGxeg7H2iTYU2wDqlszaK33QlcbtHTgR7WScvY/3e2/csHUWaoTSOW-b-_bwj_a4A/h1/EqZyejgUfon2gtJ5Mq5czTObyaDnsYymUdIdJTW4FvM) | [**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7Xq7OWWhVN4JthAGeGYAwAwn024SNzKknLZaRAnWNAWrMpuUAX0r2QbxOWpI_zUyEbuAkgNIBp3LZRc4feFiXwv9WGTsuTIFx9kj5U8zlJ5Ph_aEh2uRRpgkRvCUOwrMgKH-phmD3DFpJknN8KZRKAWZaV6EL935_F0PIHuh0cT6EyfZu6w1wsC6wvSL1LsR20rrzXKaoHHpKX5A9RokImK7fCtrC0BP2wyWCCDul3_aGYMJvyPp-X81np_tef66-xhU7pd7dnmNYvJA5fqYxmxZWCQh1ikfBvygmDuNNGWXH/3e2/csHUWaoTSOW-b-_bwj_a4A/h2/IQVo3JE9Khjx4kjrxiTgEmVnNB2myX6yU0nuC-MGhnA)

Tim

| | **Chief's Brief: July Progress**
---
| | Here is your evening briefing. We have had a very solid showing of support from the field this afternoon. Even though I was travelling today, my staff have kept me abreast of the progress we've made throughout the day. We only have 6 more hours left to hit our July goals Here is where things stand now:

* **_We are only short 5 individual contributors_** to reach our goal for July--_I have zero doubt that we will hit that mark_. Keep pushing. I very special thank you to my wonderful team for all of your hard work throughout the last 42 hours.
* **_We are short $3,300.50_** to reach our July fundraising goal. _I am a little concerned we may not hit that goal._ But, I believe in all of you and I know you will pull through because one what is at stake. We simply can't allow Dan Newhouse to get re-elected because he outraised us with special interest dollars. If you're holding back a large contribution, now is the time to make that gift! We appreciate you all so much!

I will receive another briefing from Jill and Shannon at 9:00 pm and will send out a final briefing to you on where we are. In the morning, I will send the final results of our July campaign.
Keep me in your prayers--I am currently working with patriots in Snohomish County who are focused on auditing the election results from 2020 and making sure that our election in 2022 is fair and transparent. _**Kim Wyman has already been out on the stump**_ working overtime trying to convince voters there is nothing wrong--nothing to see here.
Let's go patriots. Let's get this done and make a statement.
Loren
END BRIEF###

Keep me in your prayers--I am currently working with patriots in Snohomish County who are focused on auditing the election results from 2020 and making sure that our election in 2022 is fair and transparent. Kim Wyman has already been out on the stump working overtime trying to convince voters there is nothing wrong--nothing to see here. Let's go patriots. Let's get this done and make a statement. Loren END BRIEF### | & | & | & | & PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS | | , 11035 Lavender Hill Drive, Suite 160, Box 194, Las vegas, NV 89135, United States You may or at any time. Powered by:&

name: Bo Dietl
subject: A good cop under fire for doing his job
body:
Hi Peter, **Bo Dietl here.** You might know me as the renowned former NYPD Detective, Fox News regular, or star in box-office hits like _Goodfellas_ and T _he Wolf of Wall Street._ But I'm not e-mailing you today to talk about me.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58046883:6Nkn4XlNW:m:1:3253819041:4726007913DBF809F313DCD0F8052F32:r) Right now there's a police officer who is being railroaded by the justice system and he needs your help immediately. I'm talking about Officer Jovanny Crespo from the Newark Police Department in New Jersey who's facing a lifetime in prison for defending himself in the line of duty when he was face-to-face with an armed criminal with an extensive criminal record. **[And so, after all of the anti-cop protests we've seen across the country, I'm asking you to step up and help Jovanny get the best legal defense possible.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58046883:6Nkn4XlNW:m:1:3253819041:4726007913DBF809F313DCD0F8052F32:r)** On January 28th, 2019, one of Jovanny's fellow officers - Officer Valerie Sanchez - pulled over a speeding vehicle with two men inside -- Gregory Griffin and Andrew Dixon. Officer Sanchez ordered the men to put their hands on the wheel where she could see them, but they refused to listen on approximately nine (9) occasions. That is when she noticed a gun lying under Griffin's leg - and she could tell he was about to reach for it. Officer Sanchez immediately called for backup. **That's when the two men sped away.** Jovanny and his partner were two of the first officers to respond to the call for backup. As the suspects ran red lights, ran over sidewalks, drove in the opposite lane of traffic and bounced off of parked cars, Jovanny knew he had to get these criminals off of the street before they killed or hurt innocent people nearby. Jovanny and his partner tried to stop the driver several times. The first time, they failed, and the car got away. The second time, they managed to catch up to them just long enough for Jovanny to get out and approach the car - but what he saw forced him to make a split-second, life-or-death decision. As Jovanny got close, he saw that the passenger had the gun pointed right at him. Jovanny did what any officer would do in that situation - he fired his weapon in self-defense. But that didn't stop the driver. Three minutes and 2.3 miles into the pursuit, they got the criminal driver to stop for the third and final time where once again, the passenger was about to shoot Jovanny. Jovanny again fired his weapon in self-defense, injuring one of the men and killing the other. As a former law enforcement officer, I've heard plenty of stories of cops involved in these kinds of deadly car chases. **But what I 'm not used to hearing is about is an officer who successfully takes two dangerous criminals off the street to be charged with aggravated manslaughter, aggravated assault, and official misconduct.** _The Newark Police Department even suspended Jovanny without pay!_ It's absolutely ridiculous that a social justice attorney is trying to ruin the life of a good cop who was doing his job and protecting himself, his fellow officers and his community. **[Can I count on you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more today to help this good officer defend himself against these ludicrous charges?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58046883:6Nkn4XlNW:m:1:3253819041:4726007913DBF809F313DCD0F8052F32:r)** Jovanny doesn't have any insurance for a situation like this, and he doesn't have the support of a Fraternal Order of Police. But thankfully, he has the support of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58046883:6Nkn4XlNW:m:1:3253819041:4726007913DBF809F313DCD0F8052F32:r) That's Jovanny and his four young children. If you've ever heard about the LELDF before, then you know that they have helped dozens of wrongfully accused and charged officers mount aggressive legal defenses by paying for expert witnesses, court fees, and other critical life expenses. _**And Jovanny's case could cost up to $350,000. **_ **[That's why I'm asking for your help today, Peter. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58046883:6Nkn4XlNW:m:1:3253819041:4726007913DBF809F313DCD0F8052F32:r)** Jovanny took two dangerous men with extensive criminal background off of the street that night. _In fact after the pursuit, other __officers_ _ found drugs and illegal hollow point bullets in the suspects car. _ But instead of being praised as a hero for doing the job he was trained to do, he's being threatened with a lifetime in prison and crippling legal fees. **[Please, make a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the LELDF right now to help get Jovanny out of this nightmare.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58046883:6Nkn4XlNW:m:1:3253819041:4726007913DBF809F313DCD0F8052F32:r)** Thank you in advance for standing with our nation's law enforcement. Sincerely, Bo Dietl Former New York City Detective P.S. These aren't the actions of a bad cop who wants to hurt people. These are the actions of a guy who wakes up every day, looks at the picture of his family in his wallet, and proudly patrols his community so that his kids can grow up in a safe neighborhood. I stand with Officer Jovanny Crespo - and I hope you will too. **[Any amount you can give today will save the livelihood and career of this good, honest police officer. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58046883:6Nkn4XlNW:m:1:3253819041:4726007913DBF809F313DCD0F8052F32:r)** [**SUPPORT OFFICER JOVANNY CRESPO >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58046883:6Nkn4XlNW:m:1:3253819041:4726007913DBF809F313DCD0F8052F32:r) _More such officers, who sacrifice so much for all of us, will face similar fates unless we speak out. Please approach an officer then next time you see one and thank them for their service! Thank you so much for supporting the LELDF and these good men and women. Please see more about these and our other cases on [www.leldf.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58046884:6Nkn4XlNW:m:1:3253819041:4726007913DBF809F313DCD0F8052F32:r) and remember - Blue Lives Matter! _ **[Support our Mission to Protect America's Protectors](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58046883:6Nkn4XlNW:m:1:3253819041:4726007913DBF809F313DCD0F8052F32:r)** (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58046885:6Nkn4XlNW:m:1:3253819041:4726007913DBF809F313DCD0F8052F32:r)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58046886:6Nkn4XlNW:m:1:3253819041:4726007913DBF809F313DCD0F8052F32:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58046887:6Nkn4XlNW:m:1:3253819041:4726007913DBF809F313DCD0F8052F32:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58046888:6Nkn4XlNW:m:1:3253819041:4726007913DBF809F313DCD0F8052F32:r)

subject: They want to destroy my life, Peter

body:
But I will never stop fighting.
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58046938:JhSfUXlON:m:1:3253819041:8A416B7D87D5FB72DBB396CE52DFBA33:r)
---
Peter,
---
The Deep State is trying to destroy my life -- all because I represented President Trump against the false and despicable charges levied against him.
---
_But I want you to know something ... I have ZERO regrets._
---
**Even after the FBI raided my home and the DOJ spied on me, I would do it all over again, because President Trump is an innocent man whose constitutional rights were attacked.**
---
_But while I continue to fight for truth, freedom, and justice in America -- I 'm _personally_ asking YOU to help fight for my _**own**_ freedom, which is now in danger._
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me marshal the resources I need to battle for my freedom and justice.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58046938:JhSfUXlON:m:1:3253819041:8A416B7D87D5FB72DBB396CE52DFBA33:r)

---
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58046938:JhSfUXlON:m:1:3253819041:8A416B7D87D5FB72DBB396CE52DFBA33:r)**
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58046938:JhSfUXlON:m:1:3253819041:8A416B7D87D5FB72DBB396CE52DFBA33:r)
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58046938:JhSfUXlON:m:1:3253819041:8A416B7D87D5FB72DBB396CE52DFBA33:r)
---
**It was startling to hear a LOUD BANG on my door at 6:00 in the morning -- and then to be greeted by 7 FBI agents, ready to raid my apartment.**
---
The agents proceeded to take seven or eight electronic devices from my home.
---
But there's one thing Biden's FBI agents refused to take: _Hunter Biden 's hard drive -- even though the warrant REQUIRED them to take it._
---
I'll tell you why they didn't take it...
---
...Because the hard drive contains EVIDENCE of the Biden Crime Family violating our country's laws for thirty years.
---
That's why liberal big tech corporations CENSORED me during the final weeks of the 2020 election every time I tried to expose incriminating evidence of the Biden Crime Family.
---
**And it 's also why the Deep State wants to throw me in jail.**
---
But, as you know, I'm a fighter just like President Trump.
---
_**Biden 's government goons can censor me, spy on me, and raid my apartment -- but I will NEVER stop fighting.**_
---
Now I hope you'll fight for my freedom.
---
**[DEFEND RUDY - CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58046938:JhSfUXlON:m:1:3253819041:8A416B7D87D5FB72DBB396CE52DFBA33:r)**
---
There's one point I want to make clear.
---
While this fund I've set up is called the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund, it's not only about __my_ freedom..._
---
...It's about YOURS.
---
We need to face the brutal fact that every single American citizen's rights hang in the balance in Biden's America.
---
If the federal government can get away with these police state tactics, then America as we know it is GONE.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me marshal the resources I need to battle for _OUR_ freedoms.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58046938:JhSfUXlON:m:1:3253819041:8A416B7D87D5FB72DBB396CE52DFBA33:r)
---
Thank you,
---

Rudy Giuliani

name: Charlie Crist
subject: Rep. Adam Schiff’s note
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
|
---

| | Friend, when you have a chance, please take a look at what my friend Rep. Adam Schiff thinks about Gov. DeSantis. I couldn't agree more -- it's absolutely critical that we defeat him.

If you haven't already, **[please make a donation before midnight tonight to help us raise $15,000 more to meet our goal for this month.](https://act.myngp.com/el/jLKT4agJMtFsCbmqz4JLIQ==/_mmSFv61G-UZvgBqfnfnfg==?refcode=20210731_f_3_fl&amount=20)**

Thank you.

Charlie Crist
\---------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: **Adam Schiff**
Subject: Defeating DeSantis.
> This is Rep. Adam Schiff, team. I have a lot to say. But first I have an important ask for you:
>
> **[Will you make a contribution right now to help my friend Charlie Crist raise $15,000 before his end of the month deadline? Every dollar is critical to helping defeat Florida Governor Ron DeSantis.](https://act.myngp.com/el/jLKT4agJMtFsCbmqz4JLIQ==/_mmSFv61G-UZvgBqfnfnfg==?refcode=20210731_f_3_fl&amount=20)**
>
> I've known Charlie for a long time. We've served together in Congress and worked together on critical legislation to help families across America. He and I worked side by side to pass the COVID-19 relief packages and legislation to protect voting rights. I know his character. I've seen his work ethic. And he would fight for Floridians in the Governor's mansion just as he has for years in Congress.
>
> On the flip side, I know a lot about Ron DeSantis, too. Not through working together -- but by seeing him stand side by side with the most dangerous president in history. Seeing him grin while signing voter suppression bills in Florida. And by watching him jockey to use his platform to be the successor to Donald Trump in 2024.
>
> Things haven't gotten much better since DeSantis left the House to become Governor of Florida. He's put more attention into building his profile and trying to disenfranchise voters in his state than trying to help the people of Florida recover from the worst pandemic any of us have ever endured.
>
> It's absolutely critical that we defeat DeSantis. And I believe my friend Charlie is the one to beat him next year. But knowing the modern-day Republican Party, they are going to do everything they can to keep DeSantis in office and tear down Charlie as he seeks to represent the people of Florida.
>
> **So right now, your contribution is critical. Charlie is ready to set the tone for the race and he needs your help to do it. Please make a donation to Charlie 's campaign today and help them hit their $15,000 goal.** | _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
> ---
> [DONATE $5](https://act.myngp.com/el/jLKT4agJMtFsCbmqz4JLIQ==/_mmSFv61G-UZvgBqfnfnfg==?express_lane=true&refcode=20210731_f_3_fl&amount=5)
> [DONATE $25](https://act.myngp.com/el/jLKT4agJMtFsCbmqz4JLIQ==/_mmSFv61G-UZvgBqfnfnfg==?express_lane=true&refcode=20210731_f_3_fl&amount=25)
> [DONATE $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/jLKT4agJMtFsCbmqz4JLIQ==/_mmSFv61G-UZvgBqfnfnfg==?express_lane=true&refcode=20210731_f_3_fl&amount=50)
> [DONATE $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/jLKT4agJMtFsCbmqz4JLIQ==/_mmSFv61G-UZvgBqfnfnfg==?express_lane=true&refcode=20210731_f_3_fl&amount=100)
> [OTHER](https://act.myngp.com/el/jLKT4agJMtFsCbmqz4JLIQ==/_mmSFv61G-UZvgBqfnfnfg==?refcode=20210731_f_3_fl)
> We need to flip Florida blue once again. And you can play a role in that today. Thank you for all you do.
>
> \-- Adam Schiff

****

---

| Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
---

Charlie Crist for Governor
P.O. Box 1547
St. Petersburg FL 33731 United States

body:
I wish I had better news, Peter, but I just took a look at our ActBlue dashboard and it looks like our fundraising numbers have taken a significant dip. See for yourself:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33293345/298441140/-1598864484?gpsid=31_130_19954&refcode=em21_210731_EOM7_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx_v2&utm_campaign=em21_210731_EOM7_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx_v2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGIwOTFhMS0wN2YyLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZjMZ_H4mBPW8ivdrW-K1Dt7pafaGJo7eB4U5sun4edI=)
Peter, I’m not sharing this to scare you into donating. That’s not how you build a sustainable grassroots campaign for the long haul. The truth is, sometimes these things happen -- and all we can do is be upfront with you, explain what this temporary lapse means for our campaign, and how we can work together to get back on track.

So, here’s my brief explanation: Our fundraising has slowed down because not enough people are opening these emails and donating. It’s no surprise given that July is a notoriously difficult month for fundraising. (It’s summer, people don’t want to be checking their inboxes -- I get it.)

The problem is, we are facing an important fundraising deadline at midnight tonight -- and if we want to reach our ambitious goal of bringing in 10,000 individual donors to our campaign, we need a few more of our best grassroots folks to chip in to this email.

[**Will you pitch in $5 or more to Sarah Godlewski’s campaign for U.S. Senate before our end-of-month deadline expires at midnight? Make a donation of any amount to help us reach our 10,000 online donor goal and defeat Ron Johnson.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33293350/298441159/-1598864484?gpsid=31_130_19954&refcode=em21_210731_EOM7_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx_v2&utm_campaign=em21_210731_EOM7_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx_v2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGIwOTFhMS0wN2YyLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZjMZ_H4mBPW8ivdrW-K1Dt7pafaGJo7eB4U5sun4edI=)

Unlike Ron Johnson, Sarah isn't taking a dime from corporate PACs -- the success of our campaign relies on support from grassroots donors chipping in a few hard-earned dollars at a time.

Wisconsinites need a leader who will fight for the kitchen table issues we all care about. That's why we have to show Sarah we're standing by her side in this race.

We can't win with your support, it's the driving force of this campaign.

Thank you,

Megan

Megan Simpson
Sarah for Wisconsin

| Sarah is fighting for you, not the top 1% -- that's why she's not accepting a dime of corporate PAC money. If you're ready to step up and join this grassroots team, help us meet our grassroots supporter goal before the end-of-month deadline by making a donation today. | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33293356/298441175/-1598864484?gpsid=31_130_19954&refcode=em21_210731_EOM7_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx_v2&utm_campaign=em21_210731_EOM7_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx_v2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGIwOTFhMS0wN2YyLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZjMZ_H4mBPW8ivdrW-K1Dt7pafaGJo7eB4U5sun4edI=)

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: speechless
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
I am absolutely speechless.
-- 5 Republicans involved in the Capitol riot are running for office
-- Republicans only need to flip 5 seats to win the House
-- And Trump teased a run for President if they win him the Majority
I refuse to let those who tried to overturn our election EVER set foot in the halls of Congress -- let alone topple our House Majority. I need urgent support before midnight to protect my colleagues and hold the House. Can you help with $15? It would mean so much to me. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=20210731_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_rs&amount=15]
It’s outrageous that people involved in such a horrific event are running for office.
It’s appalling that Trump is behind the scenes cheering them on.
And I will NEVER sit by and let Republicans like these lose us our House Majority.
But I need your urgent help.
Will you rush $15 before midnight to help me protect the House from Trump and his dangerous followers? I need 871 Pelosi Democratic Members before midnight to protect my Democrats on the front lines. This is so crucial, I would be so grateful for any generous gift you can spare. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=20210731_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_rs&amount=15]Chip in $5 now >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=20210731_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_rs&amount=5]

Chip in another amount now >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=20210731_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_rs&amount=25]
Thank you, Nancy
Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives.
As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy.
We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important.
Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can we count on your support?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=footer&amount=25] SHOP [https://store.pelosiforcongress.org/]Nancy isn't one to back down from a fight, and we're in this for the long haul. name: Nikki
subject: Can I count on you?
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Friends—

I’m sorry to bother you on the weekend, but this is urgent. Stefanie and I just touched base, and I wanted to give you an update on fundraising.

We’re still $2,901 short of our July fundraising goal.

I’m hoping I can count on you to help us close the gap, friends. If you’re in a position to give before midnight, please click here to chip in now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-nf-july-eom]

I’m worried, friends. We set these monthly goals to ensure we’ll have the resources to defeat Ron DeSantis next year. Staying on track is critical to executing our most aggressive campaign plan.

So team, I’m asking you directly. If you’re able, please click here to chip in before midnight and help us finish July strong. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-nf-july-eom]

With Gratitude,

Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

name: Team Franchot
subject: Urgent request
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Hi Peter --
We’re at the end of July, and we have a little work ahead of us if we want to keep pace with our fundraising goals! Right now, we’re just $6500 away from hitting our goal.
We’ll be honest with you: we’re working against the current to hit our donation goals for grassroots supporters today. For many campaigns, the summer months are typically slower periods for fundraising, but we have to continue growing our support for Peter Franchot if we’re going to be firing on all cylinders in 2022.
If you’re able, will you rush a contribution to help us meet our fundraising goal before our 11:59 PM deadline tonight?
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/july2021fundraising?amount=10] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/july2021fundraising?amount=20.22] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/july2021fundraising?amount=50] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/july2021fundraising?amount=100] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/july2021fundraising]Whether small or large, any amount you can give makes a big difference if we can get a lot of our supporters to chip in a few dollars at a time! Grassroots supporters like you have a major role to play in our people-powered movement. Peter Franchot has a bold vision for the future of our state that includes building statewide mass transit, making Maryland the renewable energy capital of America, combating the student debt crisis, and so much more. We’re working day-in, day-out to make this vision a reality, but we can’t do it without your help!
Your contribution will help us print more yard signs and field literature, run more digital ads, place more phone calls, and knock on more doors to win the votes that we need to secure our victory.
Click here to rush a donation before our 11:59 PM deadline tonight. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/july2021fundraising?amount=20.22]
Thank you,
Team Franchot
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/july2021fundraising?amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
