body:
All of our progress is on the line in the midterm elections -- and it’s up to us to reelect all of our Democratic champions like Senator Patty Murray and keep the Senate blue in 2022 and beyond.
#
We're just making sure you saw this, Peter.
**[All of our progress is on the line in the midterm elections -- and it’s up to us to reelect all of our Democratic champions like Senator Patty Murray and keep the Senate blue in 2022 and beyond. Make a $5 contribution right now if you’re ready to join the fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33299665/298457450/525774260?refcode=pm_em_210731_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzk3NGQ0NC0xMGYyLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XRo_VynQGBD5CSQZNB2TSCrdQAgjOMtvmEOFTeGJHr4=)**
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33299669/298457467/525774260?refcode=pm_em_210731_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzk3NGQ0NC0xMGYyLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XRo_VynQGBD5CSQZNB2TSCrdQAgjOMtvmEOFTeGJHr4=)**
\---Original Message from Patty Murray---
I’ll keep this short, Peter:
From Spokane to Seattle and everywhere in between, I am constantly hearing from constituents about the need to not just get back to the way things were before this pandemic, but to level the playing field for working families and build back fairer and stronger.
So every day in the other Washington, I am fighting to make progress for families in Washington state on issues like affordable health care, child care, education, paid leave, and much more.
But while I am working as hard as I can together with my Democratic colleagues to make real progress for the American people, the Republicans are gearing up for a fierce battle for control of the Senate. _In fact, the national GOP just dropped more than a million dollars on attack ads against Senate Democrats._
**We have a huge fundraising deadline coming up on Saturday -- so I’m asking this team to step up and help us compete with the Republicans’ big haul because I know that the power of the grassroots is stronger than any special interests. And we absolutely cannot let the GOP outraise and outspend us when there is this much on the line, Peter.**
**[I just set a $10,000 flash fundraising goal ahead of the end-of-month deadline. If you’re ready to fight back against the GOP and keep the Senate blue, pitch in $5 right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33299672/298457511/525774260?refcode=pm_em_210731_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzk3NGQ0NC0xMGYyLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XRo_VynQGBD5CSQZNB2TSCrdQAgjOMtvmEOFTeGJHr4=)**
Thank you,
Patty

**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33299675/298457531/525774260?refcode=pm_em_210731_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzk3NGQ0NC0xMGYyLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XRo_VynQGBD5CSQZNB2TSCrdQAgjOMtvmEOFTeGJHr4=)**

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**

body:

Friend, did you get my earlier email? My fundraising team just gave me an update, and we're _so close_ to our goal - but still running $2,425 short.
If Democrats lose a single Senate seat, control of the chamber returns to Mitch McConnell and Republicans - and I'm concerned they might be gaining momentum, Friend. Senate Republicans' powerful campaign committee just set a new fundraising record - and their leader has gone on record naming my seat as a target.
The stakes are too high for us to fall short of tonight's goal and risk letting Republicans retake control of the Senate. The future of our planet, of every American's voting rights, women's healthcare, of our very democracy - all of these and more are on the line.
Democrats have proven before that we _can_ take on the GOP megadonor machine and win - but it only works when every grassroots donor like you pitches in. **So before midnight, I 'm asking: Will you please rush a contribution to ensure we can protect every Democratic Senate seat, advance President Biden's agenda, and keep Democrats in control of the Senate?**
**[Click here to donate $5 or more now to protect every Democratic seat and keep Mitch McConnell out of the majority.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1055-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
Thank you,
Dick

name: Tim Ryan
subject: Let me tell you what I mean
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33300062/298459465/602283465?refcode=20210731_TR_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTU5MTliMS0xMGYyLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eQy5ecws3VoIUoHgxN9DiSDLzez_oE4FDo4Sykv51-k=) Friends, I’ll say it until my voice goes hoarse: **It’s time to cut workers in on the deal.** Let me tell you exactly what I mean by that. It means understanding workers are doing everything right and still finding themselves unable to get ahead. It means acknowledging workers are the lifeblood of our economy -- and then building that economy around them. It means good wages, secure retirement, affordable health care, and breathing room for everyone. I’ve worked with businesses my entire career. It’s not workers versus businesses -- it’s a partnership. But when a CEO is making nearly 400x what their workers are making, something is broken. **I’ll always say it loud and proud (and yell if I have to): Workers first.** [**If you think it’s about time we put workers first in the Senate, I need you to split a donation between my grassroots campaign and Seth Moulton's and help flip Ohio’s open seat blue. clean_body: Hi there — Rebecca here. We’re just hours away from our end-of-month deadline, and I have some concerning news: We’re not yet on track to meet our July fundraising goal. Our monthly goals aren’t arbitrary. We set our budgets based on what we need to help our campaign thrive — from opportunities for Martin to connect with New Mexicans on the issues they care about, to investments in online ads to reach voters, to funds to support our local county parties. In short, meeting this goal is really important. We can’t afford to make any big budget cuts, so we’re counting on this grassroots team to step up at this crucial moment. So will you chip in $10 or any amount you can spare right now? If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Every dollar you give matters in our work to act on climate, lift up our communities, and make our economy work for everyone. Ever since Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate Glenn Youngkin entered the Virginia Governor’s race, he’s outspent every other candidate — even Terry.

In a race as tight as this one, that could spell disaster for Democrats.

I don’t need to remind you that not only have the polls shown that this race is a statistical tie — not only is history against the Democrats in this one — but everyone from top analysts at Nate Silver’s _FiveThirtyEight_ to Virginia elections guru Larry Sabato say that this will be _**the most competitive race of 2021.**_

Republicans are desperate for a win after the shellacking we gave them in 2020, and the Virginia Governor’s race is their best chance to pick up a high profile victory.

clean_body: | | | = | | I’ve got a really important ask for you right now because we don’t have much time left — = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Ever since Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate Glenn Youngkin entered the Virginia Governor’s race, he’s outspent every other candidate — even Terry. In a race as tight as this one, that could spell disaster for Democrats. I don’t need to remind you that not only have the polls shown that this race is a statistical tie — not only is history against the Democrats in this one — but everyone from top analysts at Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight to Virginia elections guru Larry Sabato say that this will be the most competitive race of 2021. Republicans are desperate for a win after the shellacking we gave them in 2020, and the Virginia Governor’s race is their best chance to pick up a high profile victory. = | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Thank you, James Carville = Terry for VA PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. name: Ron DeSantis
subject: The Lockdowns Are Back
body:
For more than a year, our freedom has been under a constant assault by the radical left. Now, they’re coming for your freedom again.
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vb8JksOow1JPiKMLRYqrGt4vLb5MgL5elrKtQQPPyjkdkHdyw_ff-p8R1M6yu5Xu3lowTQ3SVXnlyGVZy3bUFDQLXvVcvsY_26_zT9TRsWpQQG6JyuvrGkNFkGSwVxBFON7J8atS7Re8wU9E4x_zig==&c=ce2fhlDppVfpVw23D1-SlS5aZ01fPqxPsaoMSRkgcV1krhPOIHINLg==&ch=v0iglBOSWNjRkxdxbvCt5ORQGfuv5BFKC6rLsd50emecezOM4tDZ-w==)
---
| Peter,
For more than a year, our freedom has been under a constant assault by the radical left. Now, they're coming for your freedom again.
We've already heard the Biden administration and government bureaucrats like Dr. Fauci say they want to keep your kids as young as 3 years old in masks, despite what the data and evidence show. Now, Fauci and the CDC are scheming to impose mask mandates on adults - which would be another ridiculous flip-flop for Fauci.
[Donate $25 today to support my mission to prevent lockdowns and protect our freedom!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vb8JksOow1JPiKMLRYqrGt4vLb5MgL5elrKtQQPPyjkdkHdyw_ff-ossjVo_-oA3Nb_azvWIbgQgdYHP2tHShg9wKpJ7NCwQ865PnvpqWKKJfoaTh59FQ5PUTqhxvmgFQpfalzDMytrSoJUkux013zpyX2t6rVbAFHPzlyDs--IrjxNFJ1sHsXEosZ0wqrGHXn9TgZKZAzE=&c=ce2fhlDppVfpVw23D1-SlS5aZ01fPqxPsaoMSRkgcV1krhPOIHINLg==&ch=v0iglBOSWNjRkxdxbvCt5ORQGfuv5BFKC6rLsd50emecezOM4tDZ-w==)
The data proves that these lockdowns and mask mandates did NOT work. Lockdowns did not better protect our citizens. And the side effects of these lockdowns: Failing state economies.
As Democratic-run states continue to struggle even today in their economic recovery, Florida just experienced its 14th consecutive month of job growth.
[Say 'NO' to Lockdowns And Stand Up For Freedom >>> ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vb8JksOow1JPiKMLRYqrGt4vLb5MgL5elrKtQQPPyjkdkHdyw_ff-ossjVo_-oA3Nb_azvWIbgQgdYHP2tHShg9wKpJ7NCwQ865PnvpqWKKJfoaTh59FQ5PUTqhxvmgFQpfalzDMytrSoJUkux013zpyX2t6rVbAFHPzlyDs--IrjxNFJ1sHsXEosZ0wqrGHXn9TgZKZAzE=&c=ce2fhlDppVfpVw23D1-SlS5aZ01fPqxPsaoMSRkgcV1krhPOIHINLg==&ch=v0iglBOSWNjRkxdxbvCt5ORQGfuv5BFKC6rLsd50emecezOM4tDZ-w==)
We CANNOT allow the corporate media and left-wing politicians to bully us into lockdowns and mask mandates again.
These politicians and government bureaucrats got a taste of power before and now they're hungry for more.
[Could you chip in $50, $25, or $15 to stand up against Fauci's lockdowns and to protect our freedom?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vb8JksOow1JPiKMLRYqrGt4vLb5MgL5elrKtQQPPyjkdkHdyw_ff-ossjVo_-oA3Nb_azvWIbgQgdYHP2tHShg9wKpJ7NCwQ865PnvpqWKKJfoaTh59FQ5PUTqhxvmgFQpfalzDMytrSoJUkux013zpyX2t6rVbAFHPzlyDs--IrjxNFJ1sHsXEosZ0wqrGHXn9TgZKZAzE=&c=ce2fhlDppVfpVw23D1-SlS5aZ01fPqxPsaoMSRkgcV1krhPOIHINLg==&ch=v0iglBOSWNjRkxdxbvCt5ORQGfuv5BFKC6rLsd50emecezOM4tDZ-w==)
These lockdown politicians are globalists who refuse to hold China accountable. They want to control you and if we don't stand strong now, who knows what they'll try to take away next.
I will continue fighting every day to preserve our freedom and liberty, but I need you to join me in our fight for freedom!
Sincerely, Ron DeSantis
---

Even one Republican win in 2022 can mean the end of Biden’s agenda and pave the way for a second Trump presidency in 2024. And we can’t let that happen.
That’s why it's critical that we hit our end-of-month fundraising goal. We must secure a path to victory in the 2022 midterm elections. subject: "Pure insanity"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
That's how a Justice Department official described the lengths Donald Trump and his supporters went to overturn the results of a free and fair election. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33303007/298472017/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkyMWM0MzYxLTE4ZjItZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uz0lCjVBDjRb2c0fBCHKb0N2grz8oBp8u-v1ajaDvaw=&emci=06950d2f-5bf1-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=921c4361-18f2-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=16335001) **"Pure insanity."**

That's how a Justice Department official described the lengths Donald Trump and his supporters went to overturn the results of a free and fair election.

New reporting revealed that over the course of several weeks after the 2020 election, Trump and his allies continually urged the Justice Department to back up their false claims of voter fraud.

They urged the DOJ to explore false claims that voting machines altered votes in Michigan. They discussed filing a Supreme Court challenge to six states' election results. Mark Meadows even shared a YouTube conspiracy video that said the election was stolen from Trump through _military satellites in Italy._

Donald Trump and his allies were so desperate to remain in power that they were willing to do whatever it took to undermine our democracy. Their endless promotion of the "Big Lie" resulted in a violent mob storming our Capitol on January 6 followed by 147 Republicans in Congress voting to reject the 2020 election results.

We need to hold these dangerous and radical Republicans accountable for their attacks on our democracy, and we're counting on your help to do it.

**[Chip in before our end-of-month fundraising deadline at midnight tonight to help us defeat the 147 Republicans in Congress who voted to reject the 2020 election results.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33303009/298472023/975632184?gpsid=8_30_19972&refcode=em21_210731_eom4_fnd_gq_act__nap_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210731_eom4_fnd_gq_act__nap_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=napa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkyMWM0MzYxLTE4ZjItZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uz0lCjVBDjRb2c0fBCHKb0N2grz8oBp8u-v1ajaDvaw=)**

Thanks,

Team Never Again Never Again PAC is working to defend our democracy from the 147 Republican members of Congress who sought to overturn the results of a free and fair election. Help us hold them accountable by chipping in $5 or more today. | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33303011/298472025/975632184?gpsid=8_30_19972&refcode=em21_210731_eom4_fnd_gq_act__nap_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210731_eom4_fnd_gq_act__nap_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=napa&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkyMWM0MzYxLTE4ZjItZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uz0lCjVBDjRb2c0fBCHKb0N2grz8oBp8u-v1ajaDvaw=)

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33305563/298482585/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWFiMTQ2ZC0xZmYyLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pMOX8OHq-mSW0-tVmfYl0CzoEudiRVIcEeEsdk4rCh4=) Friend,

**Believe it or not, many Texas Democrats running for office -- myself included -- have been forced to announce campaigns for Congress without knowing exactly what our districts will look like, or who all our voters will be.**

We have the Texas GOP to thank for that. Our state is one of the most gerrymandered in the entire country. We may have just added two congressional seats, but that's only emboldened Greg Abbott and the GOP to exploit the redistricting process, silence voices, and solidify their ironclad grip on our state.

This is being done by design. _Is it unfair?_ Absolutely. But too much is at stake for us to give up on our progress, especially when there's a proven roadmap for us to defeat the GOP at the ballot box next year.

**Early resources are going to be critical in defeating the GOP's voter suppression machine. Your support right now means that we're able to get out and talk to more voters earlier than ever, and build a strong machine to turn out Democrats on Election Day.**

**[Tonight marks the most important fundraising deadline for our campaign thus far. We set out to raise $25,000 and we're coming up $9,422 short. We can't risk any roadblocks if we're going to flip Texas blue next year. clean_body: | = Friend, Believe it or not, many Texas Democrats running for office -- myself included -- have been forced to announce campaigns for Congress without knowing exactly what our districts will look like, or who all our voters will be. We have the Texas GOP to thank for that. Our state is one of the most gerrymandered in the entire country. We may have just added two congressional seats, but that's only emboldened Greg Abbott and the GOP to exploit the redistricting process, silence voices, and solidify their ironclad grip on our state. This is being done by design. Is it unfair? Absolutely. But too much is at stake for us to give up on our progress, especially when there's a proven roadmap for us to defeat the GOP at the ballot box next year. Early resources are going to be critical in defeating the GOP's voter suppression machine. Your support right now means that we're able to get out and talk to more voters earlier than ever, and build a strong machine to turn out Democrats on Election Day. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Last year, we shocked the press and pundits -- not to mention the political establishment -- when we won the Democratic primary in TX-31 on an economic message and by going to over 50,000 doors in our community. = Thanks, Donna = | = Donna Imam is a computer engineer and Democrat running for Congress in Austin, Texas. Right now Austin is represented by three right-wing GOP members due to gerrymandering. But since Texas is gaining two new districts in 2022, this is our best chance to change that. **END OF MONTH DEADLINE: 07/31/21**

Mark McCloskey

Peter -- As we face a major fundraising deadline at midnight, I wanted to lay out the stakes for you.

**2022 WORST-CASE SCENARIO:** Republicans beat Gov. Newsom, turn CA-41 red, take back the House and Senate majorities, oust elected progressives like me in the state, and turn California and Congress into a MAGA hellscape.

**2022 BEST-CASE SCENARIO:** We keep and strengthen our House and Senate majorities, beat back MAGA extremism, and execute on our progressive priorities to create a United States that works for ALL Americans.

Peter, YOU could be all the difference between these two scenarios.

Because this campaign and all of our accomplishments wouldn’t be possible without you. And whether we win or lose in the future will also be because of you.

Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. clean_body: You could make all the difference. | = Peter -- As we face a major fundraising deadline at midnight, I wanted to lay out the stakes for you. 2022 WORST-CASE SCENARIO: Republicans beat Gov. Newsom, turn CA-41 red, take back the House and Senate majorities, oust elected progressives like me in the state, and turn California and Congress into a MAGA hellscape. 2022 BEST-CASE SCENARIO: We keep and strengthen our House and Senate majorities, beat back MAGA extremism, and execute on our progressive priorities to create a United States that works for ALL Americans. Peter, YOU could be all the difference between these two scenarios. Because this campaign and all of our accomplishments wouldn’t be possible without you. Peter,

Radical leftists in Congress are attempting to remake government as we know it. **Bernie Sanders and Peter DeFazio are proposing a massive $3.5 trillion package** - or the most dramatic increase of government influence in the lives of everyday Americans since the New Deal Era of President Roosevelt.

It’s truly unfathomable. Even more so when you take into consideration that my opponent represents a district that is more Republican than the national average.

My opponent wants a cradle-to-grave entitlement system to be run by the government. A government run by career bureaucrats accountable to no one. _That’s ridiculous._

**We haven’t quite reached the point of no return yet, but we’re close, and if we’re going to do something about our current quagmire,**[then we must act fast.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=bb6375ef95bb4c5f89fcf13d1415d4b5&_e=75LhndHPn5WYlHgXcHcuhx9W5ZhqU8rKJwZPKRbc3TdJuOvl5Gk4FM2o86_O3wDt_rD8rKNqcfmO1utF72n9uVSUnYbyl3IPKNDXFt9khVnMx6n_bRORCfvqCzx9XgC1c46JCqB-n5dTguEpOIuCbSM69G9DR7uC2rF7JJE2XUtynhKFIVYnYD9iKMm87k_glnka906JaOvnunPnqiknrfxHTjKUct8VUqmwbm3t33L9DEsBYfmpA57e0pXiLMMy0vPUw6Iy3pjZNnKNJr-5LcnD_M74T67IoazN7SyjCvOjlTGJlm0wFGLeLw27BF5CBdCAHAx2fDYsoVlWZS0Dmx_JrVt7pECb7C_vFs_E4ZeMnRLPqAK5jyGujIisW5bscvrv_NEFTv5tYRBxCsLUD15m2IvLGft27AGmOpdbJOF4Yn-ZwPDH8SX_nXD-K6RX)****

clean_body: We haven’t quite reached the point of no return yet, but we’re close, and if we’re going to do something about our current quagmire, then we must act | Peter, Radical leftists in Congress are attempting to remake government as we know it. Bernie Sanders and Peter DeFazio are proposing a massive $3.5 trillion package - or the most dramatic increase of government influence in the lives of everyday Americans since the New Deal Era of President Roosevelt. It’s truly unfathomable. Even more so when you take into consideration that my opponent represents a district that is more Republican than the national average. My opponent wants a cradle-to-grave entitlement system to be run by the government. A government run by career bureaucrats accountable to no one. That’s ridiculous. We haven’t quite reached the point of no return yet, but we’re close, and if we’re going to do something about our current quagmire,** I emailed you on Wednesday, then I followed up with you again yesterday to let you know about my July fundraising goal, There is so much at stake, not only our nation’s future, but my own future as a Republican candidate for Congress, if my campaign doesn’t raise the necessary money to remain solvent this month. I’m never going to hit my goal and get into the RNC’s “on the radar” program for promising candidates if we don’t hit our goal this month - and ** Thank you, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. body:
TRUMP: I will run for president if we take back the House
I'll be quick: This is the most important ask I have ever made of you. Trump just vowed to run for President if Republicans unseat my Democratic Majority. And his donors rushed him $250 MILLION to do it. I need a historic response -- 3,000 gifts before my End of Month Deadline at midnight -- to protect my Democrats and make Trump’s plan BACKFIRE. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=20210731_em_fr_b2_pelosi_30_rs&amount=15]
I need you to make a crucial choice in this moment:
-- We can either let Trump shovel millions to Republicans, steal our Majority, and barge back into power...
-- Or we can rise up, send a historic response, and show Trump he will NEVER take the House from us.
Trump just hinged his entire Presidential run on reclaiming the House.
I will fight with everything I have to defend it from his grasp.
But I can’t do it alone -- not when he’s armed Republicans with $250 MILLION to defeat us.

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: My Grandpa Earl
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
|
| | | | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e2d3f78bacbf4db2bb1d988ccc6753d5&_e=GgTJYqBtnAuQUstZNvzxsHDPwvwd2OAmi50qA8FU1FHjD68ENKRHhILDET2xcMoHh86RDOkgTURWNj8d_E_SQ3Bzm6J_K7Xo2ruAOt7D8iFdtsqAsF-_lqfsOjazPtrO3g9EdJYw2C17EUnacD53Epka43m5O5_BAGuHIQhcoNCJmJGuz997eFmhS-JxH5nb_3xNDUVt5fsV7GFR8p7VgiIMMW3VClJRvUc6xIKuw6zk0dr4mZIWQMKi9eqeSJH2ysFongb99eKHEmLrsFXz8ljyop2Ua_tbfMgYslTueDq1eq4lzLxdRpaD1CVWobW1PEBj9fqLvUX1V7e0O9O3m2BXQt3O5pjC0gUoOXmh8VSGdva_-WHcD2tJYGRr5WpDexEVaGFwWFvn4zOyh6ffRNkbElUfoeawrQTIGjOXnvEX2HtjkahIvaB9LT_pjDDjIBIzJKsofdpNcF8se8X1Wn8xlrZq0JPqfw_vv9Fq8o8H4yiLisH4EpG4klRv3RYL)
---

_Being a straight shooter has always come naturally to me._ In the Pompeo family, I've often been compared to my grandfather, Earl Mercer. Grandpa Earl was pretty rough cut, and he always said what was on his mind.

He never won a "Mr. Congeniality" contest, but when the going got tough, you wanted Grandpa Earl around. In the 1940s, Grandpa Earl was the Sheriff of Mitchell County, Kansas. Population today: less than 6,500.

Us grandkids learned a lot from Grandpa Earl. He was regarded as a great sheriff because he knew who he was and never tried to be something else--and he knew who the people of Mitchell County were and what they expected--and he respected that.

**We learned to always stay true to ourselves and move on down the road. Never give up. Never stop fighting.**

Peter, we are in a fight right now for the future of our country. It might be easy to get discouraged watching the radical Left try to move our country in entirely the wrong direction. _But we can 't back down or give in. We have to stay in the fight and stand up for what is right._

To keep the fight alive, we must have the resources to counter the Democrats' BIG MONEY machine. We are just hours away from the most important fundraising deadline of the year, and I'm counting on your donation to help us meet our goal.

---
| | [CHIP IN NOW](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e2d3f78bacbf4db2bb1d988ccc6753d5&_e=GgTJYqBtnAuQUstZNvzxsHDPwvwd2OAmi50qA8FU1FHjD68ENKRHhILDET2xcMoHh86RDOkgTURWNj8d_E_SQ3Bzm6J_K7Xo2ruAOt7D8iFdtsqAsF-_lqfsOjazPtrO3g9EdJYw2C17EUnacD53Epka43m5O5_BAGuHIQhcoNCJmJGuz997eFmhS-JxH5nb_3xNDUVt5fsV7GFR8p7VgiIMMW3VClJRvUc6xIKuw6zk0dr4mZIWQMKi9eqeSJH2ysFongb99eKHEmLrsFXz8ljyop2Ua_tbfMgYslTueDqjO9HmY-OqNvege6PSxYgZy9KdHcdyrfJNGBCZUfci1nUJX2U0fsm1yhE0R0RXHzAq_8zcB6BREiC35nMmYGvp52hSsvCCHbb_bS2icDh1WO35M45j7Erql_mOD1E4GFgs5ArRogS8S7uzAgI4bI4y16hNpd62yFGB36Y5sOsy_feaiMCEedvemIW72KsFSRcwfMRuJ34RtmcWxVwY4uxh)
---

Your contribution of just $35 dollars could make all the difference, so **[please consider chipping in whatever you can.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e2d3f78bacbf4db2bb1d988ccc6753d5&_e=GgTJYqBtnAuQUstZNvzxsHDPwvwd2OAmi50qA8FU1FHjD68ENKRHhILDET2xcMoHh86RDOkgTURWNj8d_E_SQ3Bzm6J_K7Xo2ruAOt7D8iFdtsqAsF-_lqfsOjazPtrO3g9EdJYw2C17EUnacD53Epka43m5O5_BAGuHIQhcoNCJmJGuz997eFmhS-JxH5nb_3xNDUVt5fsV7GFR8p7VgiIMMW3VClJRvUc6xIKuw6zk0dr4mZIWQMKi9eqeSJH2ysFongb99eKHEmLrsFXz8ljyop2Ua_tbfMgYslTueDoiRcHbqpVeqQ8Zx2By-e0Wfeh0IuruNUrmPO72KEHKMIo-x6Ywe0nQRf2dgAZfR6TUhLEOcMEimGM4XKyp2MWnGrWdr88hYwUUKN4JywMFyeObmU8K7Ri5lYeU-e9AEOyjegNBbqw4kftj5wehuXi1ZB_it1N690whm0Ku0diJ3EcZ5Yp2Qibi-f3vKQbjO51Yz6wh7vdoI41nL77COofe "please consider chipping in whatever you can.")** We cannot give up on America!

No matter what happens, I promise you that I will never stop fighting for our values, our freedoms and our country. _Because Grandpa Earl taught me to keep my faith, to work hard and to never give an inch._

Fighting for our future,

clean_body: | | | | | Being a straight shooter has always come naturally to me. In the Pompeo family, I've often been compared to my grandfather, Earl Mercer. Grandpa Earl was pretty rough cut, and he always said what was on his mind. He never won a "Mr. Congeniality" contest, but when the going got tough, you wanted Grandpa Earl around. In the 1940s, Grandpa Earl was the Sheriff of Mitchell County, Kansas. Population today: less than 6,500. Us grandkids learned a lot from Grandpa Earl. He was regarded as a great sheriff because he knew who he was and never tried to be something else--and he knew who the people of Mitchell County were and what they expected--and he respected that. We learned to always stay true to ourselves and move on down the road. Never give up. Never stop fighting. Peter, we are in a fight right now for the future of our country. It might be easy to get discouraged watching the radical Left try to move our country in entirely the wrong direction. But we can 't back down or give in. We have to stay in the fight and stand up for what is right. To keep the fight alive, we must have the resources to counter the Democrats' BIG MONEY machine. We are just hours away from the most important fundraising deadline of the year, and I'm counting on your donation to help us meet our goal. | | Your contribution of just $35 dollars could make all the difference, so "please consider chipping in whatever you can." We cannot give up on America! No matter what happens, I promise you that I will never stop fighting for our values, our freedoms and our country. Because Grandpa Earl taught me to keep my faith, to work hard and to never give an inch. Fighting for our future, | Mike Pompeo | | Make sure you never miss an update from Mike Pompeo and CAVPAC! Add info@email.cavpac.com to your address book! | | | | | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- | PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE. PO BOX 2485 SPRINGFIELD, VA 22152 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

President Trump noticed your name was MISSING from the July End-of-Month Donor List. You’re always a TOP supporter, so NOT stepping up just isn’t like you... And their attacks are working -- a recent poll shows us DOWN by one point. **[We can't afford to slip in the polls this early on. clean_body: | | | "You know, there's going to be a very competitive Senate race where we're going to beat Maggie Hassan and help take back the Senate" – Tom Cotton National Republicans are attacking Maggie, friend. Tom Cotton joined a long list of Republicans, including Mitch McConnell, Mike Pence, and NOW Donald Trump , who know the path to the Senate runs through New Hampshire. And their attacks are working -- a recent poll shows us DOWN by one point. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = = = It's not just Republicans who are laser-focused on this race. News outlets across the country have labeled Maggie as the most vulnerable Democratic Senator up for reelection. With control of the Senate literally hinging on her seat, it's critical we have as much grassroots support as possible. With your help, we can defend Maggie's seat and protect our slim Senate majority. But we're running out of time. = Thank you, Team Maggie | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Maggie for NH PO Box 298 Concord, NH 03302 United States To receive fewer emails, click Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Maggie for NH

name: John Fetterman
subject: really damn important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We need to raise exactly $102,769 to meet our July end-of-month fundraising goal.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210731-2170-header&t=1&akid=2170%2E434096%2Ew--dVU)
Hey, it's John Fetterman. I'm reaching out today with something kinda urgent + important that I'm hoping you can help with, Peter.
So I checked ActBlue, and it looks like we'll need to raise *exactly* $102,769 to meet our July end-of-month fundraising goal.
**That means we’ve only got _< checks notes>_ a few hours to close the gap in our fundraising. 😬**
According to the records I have on file, you haven't donated to our campaign yet this month. So today, on behalf of me, Gisele, and our entire campaign team, I am humbly and respectfully asking:
[**_Will you please make your very first donation of $5 to our campaign before midnight tonight? Your donation will have a direct and immediate impact on reaching our $102,769 July fundraising goal._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25921?refcode=em20210731-2170&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2170%2E434096%2Ew--dVU)
__[**__**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25921?refcode=em20210731-2170&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2170%2E434096%2Ew--dVU)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25921?refcode=em20210731-2170&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2170%2E434096%2Ew--dVU)**
Look, reaching $102,769 is really damn important, especially now that our campaign is growing like never before. As you might have heard, we're opening our very first office in Pittsburgh at the end of the summer.
But that's *only* the beginning. **Raising this outstanding $102,769 in our budget means I can actually greenlight more urgent and necessary campaign expenses** , large and small, including:
* Organizers to reach all 67 Pennsylvania counties
* Pittsburgh office utilities (water, gas, electric)
* Color copier/printer for office (and ink)
* More campaign literature (door hangers + palm cards)
* Gas for our campaign van
* Snacks for volunteers
* Canvassing supplies (clipboards, pens, stickers)
* Additional office space across our big, beautiful Commonwealth

[**_Peter, will you please donate your first donation of $5 to help our campaign reach $102,769 by TONIGHT at midnight? Only when our outstanding balance is gone and our July fundraising goal is met can we resume growing our campaign operations._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25921?refcode=em20210731-2170&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2170%2E434096%2Ew--dVU)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25921?refcode=em20210731-2170&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=42&akid=2170%2E434096%2Ew--dVU)**
Together, and only together, can we end July strong. 🙏
More soon,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. I mean it when I say that every contribution makes an impact, Peter. For example, a modest gift of $10 could cover a few clipboards, while something bigger like $150 could get us like a third of the way towards an office printer. [**_Could you please send your first $5 our way to help close the gap on our $102,769 goal?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25921?refcode=em20210731-2170&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=43&akid=2170%2E434096%2Ew--dVU)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210731-2170-footer&t=44&refcode2=2170_434096_w--dVU&akid=2170%2E434096%2Ew--dVU)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=45&akid=2170%2E434096%2Ew--dVU)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=46&akid=2170%2E434096%2Ew--dVU)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: a HUMILIATING defeat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | I'm speechless.

**[House Republicans have just broken FOUR monthly fundraising records in a row -- and now have $11 MILLION more at their disposal than my House Democrats.](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/x4-)**

Hear me: I refuse to let Republicans outraise us and take back the House.

So I'm calling for a massive surge of support -- 5,OOO more gifts before my End of Month Deadline -- to ECLIPSE this GOP fundraising haul and defeat every House Republican who ever enabled Donald Trump.
| [END OF MONTH DEADLINE: TONIGHT, 11:59PM
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com

_Suggested Support: $3_](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/j~EpTLmRP-)
---

I need to be perfectly clear:

I will NOT let Trump and his Republicans take back our Majorities from us in their attempts to regain power.

So I'm asking from the bottom of my heart:

Will you rush $3 to OUTRAISE House Republicans and hand them a HUMILIATING defeat?

_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Chip in $1 immediately>>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/NaPAfrk_)**

Nancy

Peter,
I know you have heard from my team and me a lot lately, so I will keep this quick.

With Democrats in control of every branch of government, along with Big Tech and the Liberal Media, we need to spend a lot of money to beat them.

**We have $2,243 left to raise by tonight.**

Your donations do not go into anyone’s pocket. They set up events with Republicans, advertisements and yard signs, and strategy meetings among party officials.

Bottom line: your donation goes towards our grassroots movement to win back the hearts and souls of this country.

**We know your love for this country. That’s why we work for you!**
[**Can you chip in? Josh

| | Hi Peter!

Did you see this email from Mike? We’re gearing up to help Democrats across the country ramp up their campaigns so we can hold onto our majority and continue implementing progressive change and rebuilding our nation — but we need your help if we’re going to be successful. [**_Will you help us close our budget gap of $4,203 by tonight at midnight?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33309133/298495373/-1253379508?refcode=MT_EM_EN_6MO_210731_1_2&amount=25&refcode2=8d120c8c-29f2-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDEyMGM4Yy0yOWYyLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xgSi2lmAOwGTu49UENvaBYG5Wi_C7z5pbAMT3r9YiTQ=)

2021 has been a life changing year for us. Democrats now hold the majority in Congress, and we continue to pass legislation that’s helping to rebuild our nation — but we can’t slow down now.

Just recently the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) reported their highest three months of fundraising ever and we know they’re gearing up in an attempt to take back the majority in 2022.

[**_Our team is dedicated to supporting Democrats up and down the ballot so we can continue implementing positive change — and we need your help. We need to raise $7,000 by tomorrow at midnight. **[Make a Donation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33309137/298495377/-1253379508?refcode=MT_EM_EN_6MO_210731_1_2&amount=25&refcode2=8d120c8c-29f2-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDEyMGM4Yy0yOWYyLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xgSi2lmAOwGTu49UENvaBYG5Wi_C7z5pbAMT3r9YiTQ=)**
We only hold a narrow majority and Republicans have already made it clear that they will do whatever it takes to win in 2022. So, Peter, will you please help us hold onto the majority by making a donation?

**Please click here →** [**_https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-july-21_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33309138/298495379/-1253379508?refcode=MT_EM_EN_6MO_210731_1_2&amount=25&refcode2=8d120c8c-29f2-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDEyMGM4Yy0yOWYyLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xgSi2lmAOwGTu49UENvaBYG5Wi_C7z5pbAMT3r9YiTQ=)

name: Bo Dietl
subject: A good cop under fire for doing his job
body:
Hi Peter, **Bo Dietl here.** You might know me as the renowned former NYPD Detective, Fox News regular, or star in box-office hits like _Goodfellas_ and T _he Wolf of Wall Street._ But I'm not e-mailing you today to talk about me.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58048857:JQJOT_lNx:m:1:3253819041:07A20B940A82EDA45F043BEDD3C11D9F:r) Right now there's a police officer who is being railroaded by the justice system and he needs your help immediately. I'm talking about Officer Jovanny Crespo from the Newark Police Department in New Jersey who's facing a lifetime in prison for defending himself in the line of duty when he was face-to-face with an armed criminal with an extensive criminal record. **[And so, after all of the anti-cop protests we've seen across the country, I'm asking you to step up and help Jovanny get the best legal defense possible.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58048857:JQJOT_lNx:m:1:3253819041:07A20B940A82EDA45F043BEDD3C11D9F:r)** On January 28th, 2019, one of Jovanny's fellow officers - Officer Valerie Sanchez - pulled over a speeding vehicle with two men inside -- Gregory Griffin and Andrew Dixon. Officer Sanchez ordered the men to put their hands on the wheel where she could see them, but they refused to listen on approximately nine (9) occasions. That is when she noticed a gun lying under Griffin's leg - and she could tell he was about to reach for it. Officer Sanchez immediately called for backup. **That's when the two men sped away.** Jovanny and his partner were two of the first officers to respond to the call for backup. As the suspects ran red lights, ran over sidewalks, drove in the opposite lane of traffic and bounced off of parked cars, Jovanny knew he had to get these criminals off of the street before they killed or hurt innocent people nearby. Jovanny and his partner tried to stop the driver several times. The first time, they failed, and the car got away. The second time, they managed to catch up to them just long enough for Jovanny to get out and approach the car - but what he saw forced him to make a split-second, life-or-death decision. As Jovanny got close, he saw that the passenger had the gun pointed right at him. Jovanny did what any officer would do in that situation - he fired his weapon in self-defense. But that didn't stop the driver. Three minutes and 2.3 miles into the pursuit, they got the criminal driver to stop for the third and final time where once again, the passenger was about to shoot Jovanny. Jovanny again fired his weapon in self-defense, injuring one of the men and killing the other. As a former law enforcement officer, I've heard plenty of stories of cops involved in these kinds of deadly car chases. **But what I 'm not used to hearing is about is an officer who successfully takes two dangerous criminals off the street to be charged with aggravated manslaughter, aggravated assault, and official misconduct.** _The Newark Police Department even suspended Jovanny without pay!_ It's absolutely ridiculous that a social justice attorney is trying to ruin the life of a good cop who was doing his job and protecting himself, his fellow officers and his community. **[Can I count on you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more today to help this good officer defend himself against these ludicrous charges?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58048857:JQJOT_lNx:m:1:3253819041:07A20B940A82EDA45F043BEDD3C11D9F:r)** Jovanny doesn't have any insurance for a situation like this, and he doesn't have the support of a Fraternal Order of Police. But thankfully, he has the support of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58048857:JQJOT_lNx:m:1:3253819041:07A20B940A82EDA45F043BEDD3C11D9F:r) That's Jovanny and his four young children. If you've ever heard about the LELDF before, then you know that they have helped dozens of wrongfully accused and charged officers mount aggressive legal defenses by paying for expert witnesses, court fees, and other critical life expenses. _**And Jovanny's case could cost up to $350,000. **_ **[That's why I'm asking for your help today, Peter. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58048857:JQJOT_lNx:m:1:3253819041:07A20B940A82EDA45F043BEDD3C11D9F:r)** Jovanny took two dangerous men with extensive criminal background off of the street that night. _In fact after the pursuit, other __officers_ _ found drugs and illegal hollow point bullets in the suspects car. _ But instead of being praised as a hero for doing the job he was trained to do, he's being threatened with a lifetime in prison and crippling legal fees. **[Please, make a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the LELDF right now to help get Jovanny out of this nightmare.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58048857:JQJOT_lNx:m:1:3253819041:07A20B940A82EDA45F043BEDD3C11D9F:r)** Thank you in advance for standing with our nation's law enforcement. Sincerely, Bo Dietl Former New York City Detective P.S. These aren't the actions of a bad cop who wants to hurt people. These are the actions of a guy who wakes up every day, looks at the picture of his family in his wallet, and proudly patrols his community so that his kids can grow up in a safe neighborhood. I stand with Officer Jovanny Crespo - and I hope you will too. **[Any amount you can give today will save the livelihood and career of this good, honest police officer. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58048857:JQJOT_lNx:m:1:3253819041:07A20B940A82EDA45F043BEDD3C11D9F:r)** [**SUPPORT OFFICER JOVANNY CRESPO >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58048857:JQJOT_lNx:m:1:3253819041:07A20B940A82EDA45F043BEDD3C11D9F:r) _More such officers, who sacrifice so much for all of us, will face similar fates unless we speak out. Please approach an officer then next time you see one and thank them for their service! Thank you so much for supporting the LELDF and these good men and women. clean_body: Hi Peter, Bo Dietl here. You might know me as the renowned former NYPD Detective, Fox News regular, or star in box-office hits like Goodfellas and T he Wolf of Wall Street. But I'm not e-mailing you today to talk about me. Right now there's a police officer who is being railroaded by the justice system and he needs your help immediately. I'm talking about Officer Jovanny Crespo from the Newark Police Department in New Jersey who's facing a lifetime in prison for defending himself in the line of duty when he was face-to-face with an armed criminal with an extensive criminal record. On January 28th, 2019, one of Jovanny's fellow officers - Officer Valerie Sanchez - pulled over a speeding vehicle with two men inside -- Gregory Griffin and Andrew Dixon. Officer Sanchez ordered the men to put their hands on the wheel where she could see them, but they refused to listen on approximately nine (9) occasions. That is when she noticed a gun lying under Griffin's leg - and she could tell he was about to reach for it. Officer Sanchez immediately called for backup. That's when the two men sped away. Jovanny and his partner were two of the first officers to respond to the call for backup. As the suspects ran red lights, ran over sidewalks, drove in the opposite lane of traffic and bounced off of parked cars, Jovanny knew he had to get these criminals off of the street before they killed or hurt innocent people nearby. Jovanny and his partner tried to stop the driver several times. The first time, they failed, and the car got away. The second time, they managed to catch up to them just long enough for Jovanny to get out and approach the car - but what he saw forced him to make a split-second, life-or-death decision. As Jovanny got close, he saw that the passenger had the gun pointed right at him. Jovanny did what any officer would do in that situation - he fired his weapon in self-defense. But that didn't stop the driver. Three minutes and 2.3 miles into the pursuit, they got the criminal driver to stop for the third and final time where once again, the passenger was about to shoot Jovanny. Jovanny again fired his weapon in self-defense, injuring one of the men and killing the other. As a former law enforcement officer, I've heard plenty of stories of cops involved in these kinds of deadly car chases. But what I 'm not used to hearing is about is an officer who successfully takes two dangerous criminals off the street to be charged with aggravated manslaughter, aggravated assault, and official misconduct. The Newark Police Department even suspended Jovanny without pay! It's absolutely ridiculous that a social justice attorney is trying to ruin the life of a good cop who was doing his job and protecting himself, his fellow officers and his community. Jovanny doesn't have any insurance for a situation like this, and he doesn't have the support of a Fraternal Order of Police. But thankfully, he has the support of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund. That's Jovanny and his four young children. If you've ever heard about the LELDF before, then you know that they have helped dozens of wrongfully accused and charged officers mount aggressive legal defenses by paying for expert witnesses, court fees, and other critical life expenses. And Jovanny's case could cost up to $350,000. Jovanny took two dangerous men with extensive criminal background off of the street that night. In fact after the pursuit, other officers found drugs and illegal hollow point bullets in the suspects car. But instead of being praised as a hero for doing the job he was trained to do, he's being threatened with a lifetime in prison and crippling legal fees. Thank you in advance for standing with our nation's law enforcement. Sincerely, Bo Dietl Former New York City Detective P.S. These aren't the actions of a bad cop who wants to hurt people. These are the actions of a guy who wakes up every day, looks at the picture of his family in his wallet, and proudly patrols his community so that his kids can grow up in a safe neighborhood. I stand with Officer Jovanny Crespo - and I hope you will too. More such officers, who sacrifice so much for all of us, will face similar fates unless we speak out. Please approach an officer then next time you see one and thank them for their service! Thank you so much for supporting the LELDF and these good men and women. Please see more about these and our other cases on and remember - Blue Lives Matter! When President Joe Biden came to Virginia last week, we saw a rush of support after folks realized _just how serious_ this race is.

clean_body: How is this happening? | | | = | | Derek, I have to be honest with you: I’m a little confused. Glenn Youngkin has made his extreme views and right-wing plans for Virginia very clear. He’s said over and over again just how proud he is to have Donald Trump’s endorsement. But, Derek, he’s virtually tied with me in three consecutive polls. And yet, our campaign is still at risk of missing our July fundraising goal! I just don’t get why folks aren’t stepping up to help take this guy down. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = When President Joe Biden came to Virginia last week, we saw a rush of support after folks realized just how serious this race is. President Biden was very clear: Donald Trump is on the ballot in Virginia. If we beat Glenn Youngkin, we can do our part to end Trumpism once and for all. But we’re getting down to the wire, Derek, and I just don’t know why we haven’t been able to reach this goal. = | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Let’s do this, Terry McAuliffe = Terry for VA PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click._ Paid for by Terry for Virginia

body:
Missing our goal could force us to cut back on our plan for August
#

Folks —
Can we convince you to make a contribution in response to this email to help elect Malcolm Kenyatta to be a champion for working families in the U.S. Senate.
Here’s why this request is so important:
**We've been emailing because we have a big goal to hit before our July fundraising deadline tonight, and missing our goal could force us to cut back on our ambitious campaign plan for August.**
What’s most important is that we generate as many individual donations as we possibly can before midnight. Donations of any amount. Whatever people can afford.
The number of people who donate is what’s important to us and to Malcolm because it shows how many people are a part of our coalition — and it shows the naysayers counting us out that we have what it takes to win.
So we need A LOT of donations in a short time, and we still have a big gap to close to hit our goal by midnight. That’s why we’re trying so hard to convince you:
[Can Malcolm count on you to make a $3 contribution to his campaign for Senate before our fundraising deadline at midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33310219/298499051/-353695395?refcode2=be7984a8-2cf2-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210731-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTc5ODRhOC0yY2YyLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K32Y7EJpOLUS1SeaUikNl5qWSPybpWAhp5QOnOoz1bk=)

Team Malcolm

I was on _Fox Business_ with Maria Bartiromo discussing how Bidenflation is gutting small businesses— _[**check out the clip now >>**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=01fa5ca724ea420092c154e7d3ba0d6d&_e=-uhr_VorT0n3IRP6Y05DmlyaAt-VtiNff2jJIkhtir8CfVX95qUFwgO-9L8bxl0WXKfkr7VJRWCZeYUZSnutuaeTemBe-vf9Nrc8S5m3Bkn2COnxjRTPu_jJg_fCFG8CJGms1l_6Q9ZfurvkLNQnCVN4rLmnZLV9WkQ5Pm1hvko8G-A_3FivW1_si8O7tap_tG3RYRQAcY4eB2vwfydxEALGP8p7fh2p9NQbL7sI9N7SM8qnbiWMRzmJwpRvluu8kXEDrg0gOj1QZTFNef8BLSRbMqzzRfoTu1vSbTTU6wGBL72g7tacSZCDcZyTa_paelH971eOKNB5RjiIJ5VsbruUQ0GR7rn6Mk2N1SCL2v4wFhdK_XBLHJ8WGFsWmW3U_XMK_A-20zg3cZ5s0BAKYnGv09x9AwaP78_4p7dK8ZtNsyBKx4TzIGreEsIEQ8Zrs9-ioFpVZ7B9DQhvPQAjF3oSK0KdmFGaHKkvBGSCXN1lIvXolZeRz2Y8gjMNo4Cs)_

Peter, between Bidenflation and the Biden handouts, things are getting bad for small businesses.

Many businesses are being forced to raise prices and can’t find anyone to hire, **_even for wages that are double what they were before the pandemic._ **

That’s because Joe Biden is prolonging this economic crisis with government handouts for his own political gain.

**It infuriates me to see small businesses, the backbone and soul of our country, being crushed yet again by Washington. **

That’s why I’m fighting back.

The only way we can win is if we Take Back The House and Get America Back to Work, but to do that I must hit my **End of Month Goal** before **MIDNIGHT TONIGHT!**

_[**Peter, will you rush $5, $10, or even $15 to help me reach my End of Month Goal so I can fight to Get America Back to Work?**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=01fa5ca724ea420092c154e7d3ba0d6d&_e=-uhr_VorT0n3IRP6Y05DmlyaAt-VtiNff2jJIkhtir8CfVX95qUFwgO-9L8bxl0WXKfkr7VJRWCZeYUZSnutuaeTemBe-vf9Nrc8S5m3Bkn2COnxjRTPu_jJg_fCFG8CJGms1l_6Q9ZfurvkLNQnCVN4rLmnZLV9WkQ5Pm1hvko8G-A_3FivW1_si8O7tap_tG3RYRQAcY4eB2vwfydxEALGP8p7fh2p9NQbL7sI9N7SM8qnbiWMRzmJwpRvluu8kXEDrg0gOj1QZTFNef8BLSRbMqzzRfoTu1vSbTTU6wEPM_L3Sm4JYl__9kjnjXHW52NUR45UWuhulsRCbYR_AIp8MPMjWvxSV5R0a11enSxtxOlmPxzxdY5_RyHVnjf9ilJBuYBno659_P0K3zORcxydg1syfQgH_EaI2qca13j5YAMEkvCN2zhucGi4eR_AN9X1p6tm9HticVrD6W8EsH3ZHvEH9Od5N05rnHVmn1_YeWKkYuM1Vm54QXdxKNUy)_

We need to keep the momentum going until we Take Back the House in 2022!

Thank you,
Andrew Garbarino

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Big money in politics is one of the reasons Congress has delayed real investments in working people for so long.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Big money doesn’t belong in politics, because that money influences our lawmakers.
#
2021 may only be half over, but it feels like it’s been a LOT longer, Peter.
The fight for robust investments in working people should not be taking this long when Democrats control the House, Senate, and White House. Weeks have been wasted as some tried to negotiate with an obstructionist Republican party. Of course, the GOP is not going to support our investments in workers, families, and communities. After all, not a single one of them voted for the American Rescue Plan that put money in pockets and shots in arms.
**Peter, I'm used to long fights for progressive change.** Before I ever ran for elected office, I was an organizer and activist in Seattle and across Washington state. I helped lead forward our citywide minimum wage increase to $15, even though big corporations tried to stop it. I continue that fight in Congress, along with the many other fights that you know I hold dear to my heart — the push for Medicare for All, a humane immigration system, racial justice, fighting climate change, College for All, canceling student debt, and much more.
You also know that I don’t take any corporate PAC money. None. Not a cent. Big money just doesn’t belong in politics, because that money influences lawmakers, their agenda, their decisions, and of course their votes. We need lawmakers at every level of government working 100% for the people — not for corporations. To be candid with you, big money in politics is one of the reasons that Congress has delayed real investments in working people for so long.
[**I’m 100% for the people every single day, and it’s why I need you to make a contribution to my campaign. We’re working hard to hit 2,000 contributions before midnight tonight — your donation will not only help us hit our grassroots goal, it’ll also help fuel our fight for working people.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210731?refcode=em20210731-507&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=507_420207_lp_5uu&akid=507%2E420207%2Elp_5uu)
**[Chip in $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210731?refcode=em20210731-507&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=507_420207_lp_5uu&akid=507%2E420207%2Elp_5uu)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210731-507-footer&t=22&refcode2=507_420207_lp_5uu&akid=507%2E420207%2Elp_5uu)**
---

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Neshoba County Fair – update from Mississippi’s free market think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/mcppupdateneshoba?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=bd229ea2ca&e=5703353baa)
---
| | [](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=7448df5e9b&e=5703353baa)
---
| | [](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=915c5db7ae&e=5703353baa)
---
| Dear Friend, Forty-one years after Ronald Reagan famously spoke at the Neshoba county fair, I attended for the first time. It was amazing! I loved listening to a great line up of speakers, and it seems to me that there is more common sense to be found on the platform at the Neshoba fair than in the whole of Washington DC.
---
|
---
| The issue of how to tackle Critical Race Theory in our schools came up, and I was pleased that much of what was said chimed with [my recent article on Critical Race Theory in the Northside Sun.](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=67eecfe4ae&e=5703353baa) Other topics speakers talked about included abolishing state income tax, Covid recovery and the economy.

To learn more about what we are doing, as Mississippi’s free market think tank, to advocate free market solutions on all this, do please read some of the articles we published this week listed below. Have a restful weekend!
---
| |
---
Warm Regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

---
|
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=0856b6309e&e=5703353baa)
---
| MJI Director Aaron Rice discusses how In the 1950s, only one out of twenty people required a government permission slip to do their job. Today, that number has skyrocketed to nearly one in three. And most of those licenses are for working class jobs.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=b495966790&e=5703353baa)
---
| Communications Director Hunter Estes discusses the major increase in support for school choice and why now is the moment to push for substantive educational change that can help our students.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=a3d589f930&e=5703353baa)
---
| In this piece, Matthew Nicaud discusses how private stewardship could be the best way to conserve Mississippi's natural beauty.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=e540081ab9&e=5703353baa)
---
| Our CEO, Douglas Carswell, and the Pelican Institute for Public Policy's CEO, Daniel Erspamer, co-wrote this op-ed in Tech Policy Press that highlights some of the major findings of our broadband report.
---
|
---

name: Giffords.org
subject: Short note
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends — we’ve sent a few emails about today’s midnight July fundraising deadline, so we will keep this short:
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation today to help us hit our 10,000 contribution July fundraising goal? Your support, regardless of the amount, will go a long way towards helping us save lives.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-july21?refcode=em210731-1-15&t=1&refcode2=434_3935704_4HhCq6&akid=434%2E3935704%2E4HhCq6)
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-july21?refcode=em210731-1-15&t=2&refcode2=434_3935704_4HhCq6&akid=434%2E3935704%2E4HhCq6)**
We are so close to hitting our goal. Every contribution you make is a direct message to Congress that we want funding for gun violence research and we want universal background checks signed into law.
We know we can hit this 10,000 contribution July fundraising goal with your help and make our intentions clear to Congress. So what do you say, friend?
**You can use the link below to make a donation today:**
[**https://go.giffords.org/go/July-Goal**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-july21?refcode=em210731-1-15&t=3&refcode2=434_3935704_4HhCq6&akid=434%2E3935704%2E4HhCq6)
Thank you for all that you do,
Team Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=434%2E3935704%2E4HhCq6) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Karen Bass
subject: I need you to realize what's on the line.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
Team,

We are living in historic times. With President Joe Biden in the White House and a Democratic majority in the House, this is our time to make revolutionary progress. We can pass policing reform, tackle the climate crisis with bold solutions, strengthen our democracy, and rebuild our economy with policies that put the people **first**.

But if we lose the House majority in 2022, we risk losing all of this and more to a GOP takeover.

The Republican campaign arm is raising millions right now. They are ready to do all it takes to take back the House and stop progress in its tracks, so I need to know you're with me in this fight for our democracy and our futures.

With just hours left to go until our end-of-month deadline, we're still $610 short of our goal. I know we can close this gap, but I need you to take part in this final fundraising push.

I had my finance team pull you a personal link for you to contribute. Please donate what you can before tonight's deadline to help us defend the House » **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bass-eom-july21&refcode1=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/t1fDsanDqi8u1UiqjWLQv4jhuHR1Cn7Du8q4wkjBBLs=/-DNj2KMNCCRdcWWmMJT0Ad4DKioMnT5imZsKOuWB5fA=?gpsid=39_132_19945&refcode=em21_210731_eom3_fnd_gq_act__KB_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210731_eom3_fnd_gq_act__KB_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)**

In solidarity,

KB
_Sent from my iPhone_

Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress

subject: Gov. DeSantis has been horrible for Florida
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
We can't afford another four years.
|
---

| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ueT84Ik7-zYJ8iIJAYSBQA==/C8EDTILGb2cdobSnjlFweg==?refcode=20210731_f_1_fl&amount=25)

**[Pitch in toward our $15,000 end-of-month goal and help Charlie DEFEAT Gov. DeSantis!](https://act.myngp.com/el/ueT84Ik7-zYJ8iIJAYSBQA==/C8EDTILGb2cdobSnjlFweg==?refcode=20210731_f_1_fl&amount=25)**
Friend, I'll get straight to the point:

Charlie's up against a far-right Republican with national backing and big money behind him. **We 've seen what a disaster Gov. DeSantis is already**, and we can't afford another four years of him in Florida -- let alone in the White House.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ueT84Ik7-zYJ8iIJAYSBQA==/C8EDTILGb2cdobSnjlFweg==?refcode=20210731_f_1_fl&amount=25)

But if Charlie doesn't beat him now, the White House is exactly where Gov. DeSantis could end up. It's obvious to _everyone_ that he's been laying the groundwork for a campaign for president. That's why he's spent so much time **pandering to his party 's base** around the country rather than focusing on the issues important to everyday Floridians.

And all that pandering has paid off -- Gov. DeSantis has a fortune in his war chest, and _tons_ of the big money donors bankrolling his campaign aren't even from Florida! If we're going to go up against that kind of money and win, we can't be missing any of our goals.

**[So friend, if you can, please make a donation before tonight's midnight deadline to help us reach our $15,000 end-of-month goal and DEFEAT Gov. DeSantis.](https://act.myngp.com/el/ueT84Ik7-zYJ8iIJAYSBQA==/C8EDTILGb2cdobSnjlFweg==?refcode=20210731_f_1_fl)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: America should follow Florida on masks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
The Free State of Florida shows the way |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=6f5fffbb6b&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

Florida showed during the COVID era that you didn't need draconian shutdowns or mask mandates.

Some good old American common sense and freedom works just fine- now we need to bring it to the Federal level.

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=6d5bcd3257&e=afa21b7626), Florida’s 9th District in Orlando. It's currently held by Democrat Darren Soto, who is carrying the water for Biden and his cronies.**

So, after finally admitting that vaccinated people could go without masks, the CDC- under political pressure from Biden- has reversed course and mandated masks yet again- even for the vaccinated!

Business Insider reports:

_The CDC recommended on Tuesday that fully vaccinated people wear masks in public indoor settings "in areas with substantial and high transmission." That includes a large swath of the US right now, including the vast majority of counties in the South._

_The CDC recommended that all teachers, staff, students, and visitors at K-12 schools mask up as well.

The goal of these new guidelines, CDC director Rochelle Walensky said, is to "help prevent the spread of the Delta variant and protect others."

The CDC said in May that vaccinated people don't need masks, a recommendation based partly on data indicating that vaccinated people were less likely to transmit the virus to others. _

So now the CDC is reversing course, just as Biden is hinting at another round of shutdowns.

Nancy Pelosi has even directed Capitol Police to arrest anyone not wearing masks on Capitol Grounds.

These measures didn't work before, and I am pretty sure they won't work again.

As usual, Florida Gov. DeSantis is showing us the way!
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=7aa0ae646c&e=afa21b7626)
---
| **Gov. DeSantis is about to outlaw mask mandates for schools here in Florida!**

_Gov. Ron DeSantis on Thursday morning had separate phone calls with Senate President Wilton Simpson and House Speaker Chris Sprowls, fueling speculation that the Legislature may convene a special session to consider outlawing mask mandates in school districts.

The phone calls come as DeSantis increases talks about calling a special session on the issue if the federal government or Florida school districts move to implement mask mandates for students. Some districts, including Broward County Public Schools, voted this week to reinstate or keep mask mandates in schools as kids prepare to return to in-person learning in August._

**Florida had one of the lowest transmission and death rates from COVID in 2020. Gov. DeSantis was right then in refusing mask mandates, and he's right now. **

Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden are abusing the COVID situation to centralize government power and remove our freedoms. I say we need to follow Florida's lead, not theirs!

The scare tactics must end! [Help me put a check and balance on Biden and Pelosi!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=79482cb931&e=afa21b7626)

[Will you help me win my congressional seat](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=60f40d2761&e=afa21b7626)? It's a red-trending swing seat that I overperformed in, in 2020 as the GOP nominee. This time, in 2022, I'm back to win it!

Scare tactics are the enemy of freedom. We need to follow the lead of the Free State of Florida- and trust freedom first!

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a3c73266fb&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=ab26f2787e&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=0f3c044542&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=82d9ea284e&e=afa21b7626)! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.
---
| |

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
_William Olson is a retired member of the US Army Active Guard Reserve. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense._
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 William Olson for Congress, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
William Olson for Congress242 Kendal WayDavenport, FL 33837-4542
[Add us to your address book](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=6d7bce8e29) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=6d7bce8e29).

subject: Illegal Release
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Joe Biden just released 50,000 illegal immigrants | | | | |
---
Can't read this? [Click here.](https://mailchi.mp/housefreedomfund/illegal-release?e=b2c16e6198)
---
| | | |
---
| | | | Peter:

Did you see the news?

**Joe Biden released 50,000 illegal immigrants into the United States without even giving them a court date. **

We don’t know how many are violent criminals, how many work for the drug cartels, or how many are infected with Covid-19. All we know is that the Left’s plan is working.

They don’t see the lawless, humanitarian crisis on the border as the problem. **To Democrats, the crisis is the solution.
**
[**ONLY A CONSERVATIVE HOUSE CAN SEAL THE BORDER. CLICK HERE TO GIVE TO HOUSE FREEDOM FUND TODAY!**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=38349b04c0&e=b2c16e6198)

Democrats _**want**_ chaos at the border so that they can sneak in as many illegals as possible, right under your nose. So far, more than **1 MILLION** illegals have crossed the border since Joe Biden took office!

Biden isn’t turning them back to Mexico. He’s letting them into our towns, without Covid tests or court dates, while telling American citizens we have to start wearing masks again!

**What happened to our country?** America belongs to the people who love her, and it’s time to take her back.

[**Support the House Freedom Fund today, and join the fight to win America back.**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=ed010e8be9&e=b2c16e6198)

HFF is the only organization in the country exclusively committed to electing **TRUE CONSERVATIVES** to the U.S. House.

HFF only supports fighters – men and women like Jim Jordan, Scott Perry, and Lauren Boebert. These are leaders ready to take on the socialist Left, the establishment GOP, the Big Tech billionaires, and the mainstream media.

**I know because HFF supports me, and that's no small thing. I've learned that when conservatives truly fight the liberals, even many of the leaders in our own party will abandon them.**

Electing more Republicans won’t change anything. Only electing conservatives can make the House great again. HFF is the Right’s secret weapon against the woke socialist Left.

As you know, under our Constitution, the House holds the **power of the purse** over the federal budget. If we nominate and elect enough conservatives next year, we can cut off Biden’s allowance:

❌ No more money to relocate illegal immigrants into our hometowns;
❌ No more money to poison our children with Critical Race Theory;
❌ No more money to get Big Tech to spy on American citizens;
❌ No more money for new mask mandates or school closures; and
❌ No more money to finance coronavirus experiments by Communist scientists in Chinese labs.

If Democrats won’t turn away illegal immigrants, then the American people have to turn away the Democrats.

[**Please join me in supporting HFF today!**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=48525e6a5e&e=b2c16e6198)

Thank you for considering this urgent request and doing so much to help fight for America's future.

Sincerely,
---
|

| Marjorie Taylor Greene
U.S. Congresswoman, Georgia

clean_body: Duty calls for me to defend America once again. | Peter, We can save America. It will only take 1 SEAT to end Kamala’s Senate majority and stop her left-wing open borders agenda that is endangering our country. As a Navy SEAL running for the open seat in Missouri, I’m going to give this mission my all. Duty calls for me to defend America once again. That’s why I’m going BIG and unlocking a 3X-MATCH for the next hour ahead of our critical end-of-month deadline TONIGHT at 11:59 PM. Thank you, Eric Greitens Navy SEAL Candidate for U.S. Senate (Missouri) \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Eric Greitens Sent: Mon, June 26, 2021 Subject: Left-wing Super PAC targeting me 🎯 To: dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com Peter, Kamala Harris knows her 50-50 Senate majority is in trouble. That’s why a liberal dark money Super PAC has gone on a fundraising blitz to save Kamala’s majority and stop conservatives like me from taking back the Senate. Last quarter, Senate Democrats’ Super PAC outraised Republicans by $9 MILLION. Meanwhile, we’re rapidly approaching an important end-of-month fundraising deadline to even the score -- but our campaign is still $63,000 short of our July goal. As a former Navy SEAL, I know that nothing is more important than protecting America from those who seek to destroy it. After four deployments overseas including Iraq and Afghanistan, I’ll never back down from a fight. You can be certain I would be Kamala’s worst nightmare in the Senate. That’s why Democrats are trying to pay whatever price they can to keep me out of Washington and keep the Senate under Kamala’s control. But with your help, we can crush their plans and save America. Thank you, Eric Greitens Navy SEAL Candidate for U.S. Senate (Missouri) Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

| Friend,

With just 5 SEATS needed to win back the House from Nancy Pelosi’s control, she knows the fate of her majority rests on Texas’ 2 NEW seats.
