clean_body: Just hours left... | Friend, With just 5 SEATS needed to win back the House from Nancy Pelosi’s control, she knows the fate of her majority rests on Texas’ 2 NEW seats. And I guarantee you that Pelosi will spend whatever it takes of her DCCC’s $36.5 million Q2 haul right here in Texas to try and torpedo our campaign from the start. Which is why I set such an ambitious goal of $500,000 for our FIRST month of the entire race -- there’s simply too much on the line in our fight to win one of Texas’ 2 new seats. But with the end-of-month deadline TONIGHT at 11:59 P.M. and just $19,195 to go, I’m counting on YOUR support to ensure we reach our goal at the final hour. That’s why I’ve even secured a MATCH for the next 30 minutes to help push us over the top. name: Mark Kelly
subject: respectfully asking
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
I have an important ask to make ahead of our July fundraising deadline tonight. I hope you’ll give me a minute to explain why this is so important.
Tonight, we are going to report our fundraising numbers for the month and we have to put up a strong showing. _But there’s also another reason why this is so important._
**This month, a Republican with the backing of a $10 million Super PAC jumped in the race, bringing our total number of opponents to FOUR. And only a few days ago, Donald Trump flew to Arizona to hold a rally and directly attacked our campaign.**
So I need your help to keep up the momentum in the face of this attack, and it’s going to take lots of people making donations of $3, $5, or $10 to get us to our 40,000 contribution goal by midnight.
**My team tells me we are close to our goal, and if we can get there, it’ll show that this team is more determined than ever to defend this seat. You can see how important this is, which is why I have to ask:**
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation to our people-powered campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our 40,000 contribution goal.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?refcode=em210731-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1080_6688874_aZA67r&akid=1080%2E6688874%2EaZA67r)

clean_body: Friends — I have an important ask to make ahead of our July fundraising deadline tonight. I hope you’ll give me a minute to explain why this is so important. Tonight, we are going to report our fundraising numbers for the month and we have to put up a strong showing. But there’s also another reason why this is so important. This month, a Republican with the backing of a $10 million Super PAC jumped in the race, bringing our total number of opponents to FOUR. And only a few days ago, Donald Trump flew to Arizona to hold a rally and directly attacked our campaign. So I need your help to keep up the momentum in the face of this attack, and it’s going to take lots of people making donations of $3, $5, or $10 to get us to our 40,000 contribution goal by midnight. My team tells me we are close to our goal, and if we can get there, it’ll show that this team is more determined than ever to defend this seat. You can see how important this is, which is why I have to ask: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** As you know, losing even one seat means losing the Senate. So I can’t thank you enough for all of the hard work you put into this campaign so far. I’m very thankful to be serving as Arizona’s Senator, and I look forward to working together with you to tackle all of the challenges that lie ahead in 2021 and beyond. Thank you for all that you do, —Mark Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

Friend ー it’s Darin.

I still can’t believe Joe Biden has the nerve to pretend like his economy is strong. It’s a slap in the face of millions of Americans who are struggling right now.

The Biden economy is great if you don’t worry about:

**→ Paying more for rent or a house if you can buy one...**
**→ Paying more for the gas to get you to work... **
**→ Paying more to put food on your family’s table...**
**→ Paying employees to help operate your small business...**

Biden thinks this economy is great because he’s never worked a real job his entire life. Now he’s using the government to pay people to do the same thing.

**Joe Biden is destroying our economy with the same socialism that he has benefitted from his entire life.** _**We can’t let that happen.**_

name: Team Padilla
subject: We keep emailing
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
#

**_July Fundraising Deadline_**
**Contribution Goal:** 2,000
**Deadline Day:** Midnight Tonight
**Suggested Donation:** $3

**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-july21?source=em210731-1-15&t=1&refcode2=210_159979_zqUQtu&akid=210%2E159979%2EzqUQtu)**
Friends —
On Thursday, Alex reached out himself about how important hitting our July fundraising goal is.
Then yesterday, we sent an email personally asking for your help because if we want to go up against the same deep-pocketed Trump donors funding the Republican recall, we need to make sure we have a deep bench of supporters who aren’t afraid to speak up or get involved.
And this morning, we’re reaching out again because our deadline is in a few hours from now and we still need 217 more contributions to hit our goal. Not that many, we are so close!
**We keep emailing because our deadline is quickly approaching and we have to put up a strong showing. Which is why we have to ask:**
[**If you are able, will you please add a contribution of $3 to our grassroots campaign before our deadline at midnight? We’re still a bit short of our 2,000 contribution goal and your last-minute support could push us over the top.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-july21?source=em210731-1-15&t=2&refcode2=210_159979_zqUQtu&akid=210%2E159979%2EzqUQtu)**

****

****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210731-1-15&t=24&refcode2=210_159979_zqUQtu&akid=210%2E159979%2EzqUQtu)**

****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210731-1-15&t=25&refcode2=210_159979_zqUQtu&akid=210%2E159979%2EzqUQtu)**

Thank you in advance for chipping in and for helping us hit this important goal this month. Achieving our goals is going to take a lot of work, and we’re so thankful to have you on our team.
We couldn’t do this without you!
Team Padilla

clean_body: Did you see Doug’s last email? The recall election is quickly approaching. It’s less than TWO months away! Now is more important than ever for..... Peter, Did you see Doug’s last email? The recall election is quickly approaching. It’s less than TWO months away! Now is more important than ever for the future of California. This is truly the final stretch in such an important time for our state. Under Newsom, California is WORSE off. We’ve been hearing from hundreds of Californians about crime... Criminals released from prisons... Defund the police initiatives... Many people agree that California is more dangerous than ever under Newsom and his liberal cronies. That’s why it’s so important that we finish this month strong and SPRINT towards the recall election. Will you chip in before the end of the month to help us beat our July goal? The clock is ticking! With not much time left, we really need to BEAT our goal. Any contribution goes a long way. Thank You, Team Ose \-------Forwarded Message Below------- Peter, We are inching closer and closer to the recall election. Under Newsom, business has run from California in massive numbers. Tesla. Oracle. Disney. They’re just headliners on a very long list of departures. But it’s not just businesses punching their tickets out of California, it’s families too. Families who were let down by Gavin Newsom’s failed policies and fed up with our unlivable tax situation. But who can blame them? It’s time we repair our state. IT’S NOW OR NEVER. We need to start by making a splash before the end of the month. My campaign is up against our biggest deadline yet... And if we’re going to fix California, we need the resources to WIN first. Thanks, Doug Ose | | PAID FOR BY OSE FOR GOVERNOR Click to unsubscribe.

body:
We are counting on you today to help us close our fundraising gap tonight by midnight. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33317037/298523582/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFmYTA4NjMyLTQ4ZjItZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=A3cYpM8pmP26P9x3Y-8wtsaPK9XSZzDiytgN7xi8RoM=&emci=cdaf6330-43f2-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=1fa08632-48f2-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=2884131) Hi Peter, Peter, I will keep this short. We have just a few hours left before our midnight deadline**[\--can you chip in $5, or whatever you can, to help us reach our July fundraising goal?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33317038/298523583/1834377524?refcode=0731&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFmYTA4NjMyLTQ4ZjItZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=A3cYpM8pmP26P9x3Y-8wtsaPK9XSZzDiytgN7xi8RoM=)** We’re still $3,743 short, but with your help right now, we can close the gap and make sure that we have the resources we need to keep powering our movement for paid leave, universal free preschool, and equal pay. Every single member of The GOP voted against the American Rescue Plan -- a bill that invested in vaccinations and aimed to cut the childhood poverty rate in half with monthly Child Tax Credit payments. clean_body: I refuse to let him down. | Peter, President Trump asked me to do everything in my power to win North Carolina for Republicans. I refuse to let him down. But I can’t do it alone. I need your help. Our End-Of-Month Fundraising Deadline is coming up soon, and we’re still $24,018 short of our Deadline Goal. If you've saved your payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through immediately. | | | | | | The Democrats have made North Carolina a top target in the midterm elections. They know that if they flip our state “blue,” they’ll crush our hopes of winning back the Majority. I promised President Trump that I wouldn’t let that happen, but the truth is that I can’t keep my promise without your help. | Thank you in advance for whatever you can do. Michael Whatley Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party

clean_body: I want to be fully transparent with you. This is not going to be an easy road. | Marcy Kaptur | | | | Friend, My focus has always been -- and always will be \-- on protecting working families in Ohio. I’ve wanted to make a concrete difference in the daily lives of people in our community ever since I can remember. During my 38 years in public service, I have seen firsthand the power of grassroots supporters like you. It is the power of the people that creates the kind of real, lasting change we are all fighting for. And while we've had an outpouring of grassroots support over the last two days, I need to be fully transparent with you. This is not going to be an easy road. Redistricting threatens our progress and plans for the future. | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Let's get to work, \-- Marcy Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. name: Jay Inslee
subject: How will we remember this summer?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
I'm personally asking.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/gp3jhwK-xYQ6/eTRyV1ZOYjNEVTVncG9kN085cHh4Z3ZUb1ljU2t1Sk5telZkVzBlT0R5WXN3MFpDS09nUStMRmJJTXVEZW00VTNvTCtxbXlycUhNbExVN052M3F1WGl5OWtjWHFHSFZvQUs5VzE2UitBR1U9S0/dHhGSmp4VjVNck43M04vUUpuRlNIaEhBU0JlVEFPZDNMaWRDdDR3aE1kQT0S1) Friend, As July comes to a close, we can look back on the summer so far and see one sobering proof point after another: Deadly heat waves throughout the United States. Wildfires so severe and widespread that even folks on the East Coast are seeing their skies go hazy. And thousand-year floods in Europe and China. It's hard to deny that this is the summer of climate change. But here's the thing: Without action, we might remember this summer as a time when our climate was _relatively hospitable_. [**_That 's not a future any of us want to live in. So today, with just hours to go before our official end-of-month fundraising deadline, I'm personally asking: Will you make a donation to support me and the fight for climate action?_**](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/GRW2C3PAV7SE/eTRyV1ZOYjNEVTVncG9kN085cHh4Z3ZUb1ljU2t1Sk5telZkVzBlT0R5WXN3MFpDS09nUStMRmJJTXVEZW00VTNvTCtxbXlycUhNbExVN052M3F1WGl5OWtjWHFHSFZvQUs5VzE2UitBR1U9S0/dHhGSmp4VjVNck43M04vUUpuRlNIaEhBU0JlVEFPZDNMaWRDdDR3aE1kQT0S1) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 ->](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/4Ee7hq_GDXH8/eTRyV1ZOYjNEVTVncG9kN085cHh4Z3ZUb1ljU2t1Sk5telZkVzBlT0R5WXN3MFpDS09nUStMRmJJTXVEZW00VTNvTCtxbXlycUhNbExVN052M3F1WGl5OWtjWHFHSFZvQUs5VzE2UitBR1U9S0/dHhGSmp4VjVNck43M04vUUpuRlNIaEhBU0JlVEFPZDNMaWRDdDR3aE1kQT0S1)

name: Erica Smith
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
This isn’t exactly the email I planned on sending.
#
Hi. It’s Erica Smith.
This isn’t exactly the email I planned on sending. But with our July fundraising deadline at 11:59 PM ET, I wanted you to hear the latest update directly from me:
**As of 12:30 PM ET today, we are still around $769 behind our July fundraising goal.**
I can’t stress enough how critical it is that we close our fundraising gap before midnight in order to continue our campaign operations.
That said, I KNOW it is absolutely possible to raise the remaining $769 in the next few hours if everyone reading this email chips in! You’re an awesome part of our scrappy grassroots team and I’m hoping I can count on you today:
**Will you please make a contribution of any amount to our campaign before 11:59 PM ET tonight?**
You can give directly at this link, or click the button below:
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-em20210731-1](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/7694?refcode=em20210731-302&t=1&akid=302%2E3698%2EFNbXXu)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
When we set these goals, they’re not just made-up tactics.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210731-2311-header&t=1&akid=2311%2E2526796%2EHqZcLh)
We’ve done the math, and based on our average donation, we calculated that we need 749 more contributions by midnight tonight to hit our July goal!
We’re so close and based on the number of supporters near you, if two people in your area contribute, we’ll hit this goal in no time.
[So, what do you think? If you’re able, can you please be one of the two people we need in your area to chip in? If you’re able to, please donate now:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210731-1?refcode=em20210731-2311-P&t=2&refcode2=2311_2526796_HqZcLh&akid=2311%2E2526796%2EHqZcLh)

We are the #1 small-dollar campaign in the House — with the highest percentage (82%) of our resources coming from small donors. We depend on folks like you chipping in $3, $15, or $27 whenever you can to expand our organizing programs, train more volunteers and prepare for another tough primary we’ll face in 2022.
Online contributions to emails like this one really matter to our campaign — and when we set these goals, they’re not just made-up tactics. We need to hit these specific targets in order to make all our critical investments in the months to come. That’s why we’re asking for your help before tonight’s deadline.
[If you’re able – and only if you’re able – please make your first contribution before our deadline at midnight.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210731-1?refcode=em20210731-2311-P&t=23&refcode2=2311_2526796_HqZcLh&akid=2311%2E2526796%2EHqZcLh)
Thank you for supporting us at a critical time for our movement.
Team AOC

name: Christopher
subject: Chief's Final Briefing 31JUL21 - 1123 hrs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS**
body:
| | _[View online](https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=BGWyYK&mc=rl&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EESIC8A&)_
---
| | |
---
| | **Chief's Brief: Someone Call the Cops...**
---
| | _**...you killed July!**_

I am pleased to share with you that we crushed our July goals and blew away the June numbers--by a lot. There is no doubt in my mind that we are talking about issues that matter to Washington citizens. Before we get into the numbers, I want to say **THANK YOU ALL SO MUCH FOR YOUR SUPPORT.** Honestly, I really don't like to be the center of attention (boy, I picked the wrong pathway!) and I am always surprised and deeply humbled by your continued support.
Here is where we ended up:

* In July, we increased individual contributions by a whopping 67.5% increase (WOW!).
* In July, we increased total revenue by 45.2% (BOOM!).

**Grassroots campaigns work. There is no doubt about that. Every month our movement grows and we are honored to stand next to you in our fight to Stand Up for America!**
Your friend,
Loren
END BRIEF###
---

name: Alex Lasry
subject: Putting progressive values first
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin
body:
I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again, we need to re-think how our economy works and we need new voices in Washington.

**[Peter, I’m reaching out today to ask you to chip in towards our end-of-month goal. We’re just $4,721 short of where we need to be by tonight, but I know with your help we can get there.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33318960/298529618/211588299?refcode=EM_FR_210731FR4_N_AL_Full_6_NG_N_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjZmZjM0MS01MGYyLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V0VhCH61-pPY5BQfP4SKwqdobvFA_ykJz4D9HreYfHo=)**

I’ve said it before, and I’ll say it again: we need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. And I have a proven record that shows progressive values are good for business:
* I brought together the public/private partnership to build the Bucks Arena and the Deer District surrounding the arena.
* As part of the agreement, I led the workforce development efforts to make sure that people often left out of major construction work got a chance to expand skills, find jobs, and build wealth.

**While others just talk about raising wages, I turned my words into actions.** I led negotiations for a historic project labor agreement that included provisions to hire women and minorities that are often underrepresented among union workers, and we also ensured a $15 minimum wage for all arena workers once it was built.

I've put progressive values into action, and now I’m running to unseat Ron Johnson and strengthen our Senate majority. And I’m asking for your support today.

**Will you make a grassroots donation of $5 to my campaign today by using this link and help us close our $4,721 fundraising gap:** **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lasry_july2021](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33318961/298529621/211588299?refcode=EM_FR_210731FR4_N_AL_Full_6_NG_N_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjZmZjM0MS01MGYyLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V0VhCH61-pPY5BQfP4SKwqdobvFA_ykJz4D9HreYfHo=)**

Thank you,

Alex Lasry

Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin
Lasry for Wisconsin
P.O. Box 511549
Milwaukee, WI 53203
United States
It's going to take everyone on this team to win this election, but if you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/ea985fc4-45f1-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7/6f6ff341-50f2-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjZmZjM0MS01MGYyLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V0VhCH61-pPY5BQfP4SKwqdobvFA_ykJz4D9HreYfHo=&id=121241229). If you'd like to stay on our list but receive fewer emails, fill out **[this form](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33318962/298529622/-215098104?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjZmZjM0MS01MGYyLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V0VhCH61-pPY5BQfP4SKwqdobvFA_ykJz4D9HreYfHo=&emci=ea985fc4-45f1-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=6f6ff341-50f2-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18659600)**.

body:

Peter ー it’s Andrew.

I was on _Fox Business_ with Maria Bartiromo discussing how Bidenflation is gutting small businesses— _[**check out the clip now >>**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=e054831d111142f1b77c513601ea4989&_e=IGfEN5ASbeRRm0M1upoRPTvGqIgxatDSBWbMZiTFd7idVklquhRqR5AusgvqlEDLuG3tYVCFDdT44_XGdZdyfC4v0JFiZNxjV4IIltctMD5PwjTxqIBgPlKNKdzlAGPaTeUSoX9s-eFVGnHB5Rfs6WV_NjVGKQ8wiqjsfs6yWxVSU1deVQIdRoDnOZ3pGEX6rliFOhCabkBKiHcR4YL6iIjnn7mmBcLjVjHZZuAffydEM7Hbbtbq0HkeTk11RII1L0BT7fKsXPXDkWOjCNGv9hAhKP_oOzNR5TAGh6gUtFcLOyfaBxUceLBrupSXHXw5EO6RMAEA-6tPa-XMeLE8kFt8wbNelKDi3WsaUdxXhDu47tsteaI6Y-0YBlzXFbIx7SJyeHlac6DYNqU-C7Ibbp8lgqF2P31xp1AuGgfxlBKztvjYa9srHw3sYkNTys4QEQUkAcsaX5o8lj3jWctfAx3qZ7MwUmuRrdhJsaWa4X9xf_d01-XlgM78y8CBD7fb)_

[](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=e054831d111142f1b77c513601ea4989&_e=IGfEN5ASbeRRm0M1upoRPTvGqIgxatDSBWbMZiTFd7idVklquhRqR5AusgvqlEDLuG3tYVCFDdT44_XGdZdyfC4v0JFiZNxjV4IIltctMD5PwjTxqIBgPlKNKdzlAGPaTeUSoX9s-eFVGnHB5Rfs6WV_NjVGKQ8wiqjsfs6yWxVSU1deVQIdRoDnOZ3pGEX6rliFOhCabkBKiHcR4YL6iIjnn7mmBcLjVjHZZuAffydEM7Hbbtbq0HkeTk11RII1L0BT7fKsXPXDkWOjCNGv9hAhKP_oOzNR5TAGh6gUtFd9qw9FUbjkFYCJkEEe_8HCiC0WSc87Ghqm1PirAnOkQ3ob6WHis7N8BNFAoz_O8JTtbtbe53NHOFpBmN5_LDJIEqcXEe7IaTG9UHR1-pshYy7Ne-pw5NYCrv7NTCUTNZMn0pDR2NGXNM74gIMFlEQJj2kn2Db-lXjWEmpqs38nCDSSW_zE_yNY0IGYH9rm2dIkM3NY7AbE0uxKnvGC_GYV)

Peter, between Bidenflation and the Biden handouts, things are getting bad for small businesses.

Many businesses are being forced to raise prices and can’t find anyone to hire, **_even for wages that are double what they were before the pandemic._ **

That’s because Joe Biden is prolonging this economic crisis with government handouts for his own political gain.

**It infuriates me to see small businesses, the backbone and soul of our country, being crushed yet again by Washington. **

That’s why I’m fighting back.

The only way we can win is if we Take Back The House and Get America Back to Work, but to do that I must hit my **End of Month Goal** before **MIDNIGHT TONIGHT!**

_[**Peter, will you rush $5, $10, or even $15 to help me reach my End of Month Goal so I can fight to Get America Back to Work?**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=e054831d111142f1b77c513601ea4989&_e=IGfEN5ASbeRRm0M1upoRPTvGqIgxatDSBWbMZiTFd7idVklquhRqR5AusgvqlEDLuG3tYVCFDdT44_XGdZdyfC4v0JFiZNxjV4IIltctMD5PwjTxqIBgPlKNKdzlAGPaTeUSoX9s-eFVGnHB5Rfs6WV_NjVGKQ8wiqjsfs6yWxVSU1deVQIdRoDnOZ3pGEX6rliFOhCabkBKiHcR4YL6iIjnn7mmBcLjVjHZZuAffydEM7Hbbtbq0HkeTk11RII1L0BT7fKsXPXDkWOjCNGv9hAhKP_oOzNR5TAGh6gUtFeTxkLjW_Vquh4Lm7PmuGMM5BVvsiFqXO_hj_5DCaiOth1gzO2P9yAL4gWnr4ay4TEaXsWvVnygzlXnxgGwkV3FzUAY-nW2ZeNtUoH3alXapUeOCUMAMFMGx504nWBC4bPlvcCNhd7_srk0Rc4xBiBKUrINcj2zECIJ9cjbJDlP_MBrkjd96lNUCi3S4VvHECXd1rSKLWOe7qPbecbsn-e0)_

We need to keep the momentum going until we Take Back the House in 2022!

Thank you,
Andrew Garbarino

The only way we can win is if we Take Back The House and Get America Back to Work, but to do that I must hit my End of Month Goal before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT! We need to keep the momentum going until we Take Back the House in 2022! Thank you, Andrew Garbarino | | | PAID FOR BY GARBARINO FOR CONGRESS | | P.O. Box 101, Bayport, NY 11705 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Bo Dietl
subject: A good cop under fire for doing his job
body:
Hi Peter, **Bo Dietl here.** You might know me as the renowned former NYPD Detective, Fox News regular, or star in box-office hits like _Goodfellas_ and T _he Wolf of Wall Street._ But I'm not e-mailing you today to talk about me.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58050236:6VWvC_lON:m:1:3253819041:6719C2B2E3E0397441DFF72D1FCBF2E7:r) Right now there's a police officer who is being railroaded by the justice system and he needs your help immediately. I'm talking about Officer Jovanny Crespo from the Newark Police Department in New Jersey who's facing a lifetime in prison for defending himself in the line of duty when he was face-to-face with an armed criminal with an extensive criminal record. **[And so, after all of the anti-cop protests we've seen across the country, I'm asking you to step up and help Jovanny get the best legal defense possible.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58050236:6VWvC_lON:m:1:3253819041:6719C2B2E3E0397441DFF72D1FCBF2E7:r)** On January 28th, 2019, one of Jovanny's fellow officers - Officer Valerie Sanchez - pulled over a speeding vehicle with two men inside -- Gregory Griffin and Andrew Dixon. Officer Sanchez ordered the men to put their hands on the wheel where she could see them, but they refused to listen on approximately nine (9) occasions. That is when she noticed a gun lying under Griffin's leg - and she could tell he was about to reach for it. Officer Sanchez immediately called for backup. **That's when the two men sped away.** Jovanny and his partner were two of the first officers to respond to the call for backup. As the suspects ran red lights, ran over sidewalks, drove in the opposite lane of traffic and bounced off of parked cars, Jovanny knew he had to get these criminals off of the street before they killed or hurt innocent people nearby. Jovanny and his partner tried to stop the driver several times. The first time, they failed, and the car got away. The second time, they managed to catch up to them just long enough for Jovanny to get out and approach the car - but what he saw forced him to make a split-second, life-or-death decision. As Jovanny got close, he saw that the passenger had the gun pointed right at him. Jovanny did what any officer would do in that situation - he fired his weapon in self-defense. But that didn't stop the driver. Three minutes and 2.3 miles into the pursuit, they got the criminal driver to stop for the third and final time where once again, the passenger was about to shoot Jovanny. Jovanny again fired his weapon in self-defense, injuring one of the men and killing the other. As a former law enforcement officer, I've heard plenty of stories of cops involved in these kinds of deadly car chases. **But what I 'm not used to hearing is about is an officer who successfully takes two dangerous criminals off the street to be charged with aggravated manslaughter, aggravated assault, and official misconduct.** _The Newark Police Department even suspended Jovanny without pay!_ It's absolutely ridiculous that a social justice attorney is trying to ruin the life of a good cop who was doing his job and protecting himself, his fellow officers and his community. **[Can I count on you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more today to help this good officer defend himself against these ludicrous charges?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58050236:6VWvC_lON:m:1:3253819041:6719C2B2E3E0397441DFF72D1FCBF2E7:r)** Jovanny doesn't have any insurance for a situation like this, and he doesn't have the support of a Fraternal Order of Police. But thankfully, he has the support of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58050236:6VWvC_lON:m:1:3253819041:6719C2B2E3E0397441DFF72D1FCBF2E7:r) That's Jovanny and his four young children. If you've ever heard about the LELDF before, then you know that they have helped dozens of wrongfully accused and charged officers mount aggressive legal defenses by paying for expert witnesses, court fees, and other critical life expenses. _**And Jovanny's case could cost up to $350,000. **_ **[That's why I'm asking for your help today, Peter. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58050236:6VWvC_lON:m:1:3253819041:6719C2B2E3E0397441DFF72D1FCBF2E7:r)** Jovanny took two dangerous men with extensive criminal background off of the street that night. _In fact after the pursuit, other __officers_ _ found drugs and illegal hollow point bullets in the suspects car. _ But instead of being praised as a hero for doing the job he was trained to do, he's being threatened with a lifetime in prison and crippling legal fees. **[Please, make a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the LELDF right now to help get Jovanny out of this nightmare.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58050236:6VWvC_lON:m:1:3253819041:6719C2B2E3E0397441DFF72D1FCBF2E7:r)** Thank you in advance for standing with our nation's law enforcement. Sincerely, Bo Dietl Former New York City Detective P.S. These aren't the actions of a bad cop who wants to hurt people. These are the actions of a guy who wakes up every day, looks at the picture of his family in his wallet, and proudly patrols his community so that his kids can grow up in a safe neighborhood. I stand with Officer Jovanny Crespo - and I hope you will too. **[Any amount you can give today will save the livelihood and career of this good, honest police officer. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58050236:6VWvC_lON:m:1:3253819041:6719C2B2E3E0397441DFF72D1FCBF2E7:r)** [**SUPPORT OFFICER JOVANNY CRESPO >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58050236:6VWvC_lON:m:1:3253819041:6719C2B2E3E0397441DFF72D1FCBF2E7:r) _More such officers, who sacrifice so much for all of us, will face similar fates unless we speak out. Please approach an officer then next time you see one and thank them for their service! Thank you so much for supporting the LELDF and these good men and women. Please see more about these and our other cases on [www.leldf.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58050237:6VWvC_lON:m:1:3253819041:6719C2B2E3E0397441DFF72D1FCBF2E7:r) and remember - Blue Lives Matter! _ **[Support our Mission to Protect America's Protectors](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58050236:6VWvC_lON:m:1:3253819041:6719C2B2E3E0397441DFF72D1FCBF2E7:r)** (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58050238:6VWvC_lON:m:1:3253819041:6719C2B2E3E0397441DFF72D1FCBF2E7:r)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58050239:6VWvC_lON:m:1:3253819041:6719C2B2E3E0397441DFF72D1FCBF2E7:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58050240:6VWvC_lON:m:1:3253819041:6719C2B2E3E0397441DFF72D1FCBF2E7:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58050241:6VWvC_lON:m:1:3253819041:6719C2B2E3E0397441DFF72D1FCBF2E7:r)

name: Donna Imam
subject: On my mind
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33320211/298533684/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjI2MTQyYy01NmYyLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZKjH1y7FndifPTw8ovLpD48E9b7a-SoUshMkXwHwC8A=) Friend,

I know I've been in touch a lot this week, but that's because tonight marks the very first monthly deadline for our campaign to win one of Texas' new congressional districts.

We're still coming up **$5,127** short of our goal. Before I ask you to help me hit the mark on this goal, let me tell you about what is on my mind as we head into the next month of the campaign.

**There are a lot of promising signs pointing to our ability to flip Texas blue next year.** Just this week, a Trump-backed congressional candidate was defeated in a special election. Democrats' infrastructure bill was poised to move forward in Congress. All of the signs point to an overwhelming rejection of Trump's agenda -- and an embrace of key Democratic priorities.

Today I joined hundreds at the Texas State Capitol for a voting rights rally. Together we stood up for our right to vote, and rallied against the GOP voter suppression machine that's targeting hard-working Texans. We’re not giving up here in Texas, and with your support we can do this!

The truth is I don’t want to be in Congress to rubber-stamp whatever the corporate lobbyists want. I'm going to be an advocate on the things that matter to all of us here in the Austin area -- from single-payer healthcare to a national solution to the housing and homelessness crisis. Sometimes that may mean going against the grain.

I won't be able to do that if I don't have a grassroots movement with me, which is why we've been so focused on launching this campaign with strength. The more you're able to support us early on, the more impact your support will have!

**[So if you're able, will you chip in a contribution tonight before you sign off for the weekend?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33320212/298533685/77586780?refcode=em-07312021-all-2-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjI2MTQyYy01NmYyLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZKjH1y7FndifPTw8ovLpD48E9b7a-SoUshMkXwHwC8A=)**

clean_body: | = Friend, I know I've been in touch a lot this week, but that's because tonight marks the very first monthly deadline for our campaign to win one of Texas' new congressional districts. We're still coming up $5,127 short of our goal. Before I ask you to help me hit the mark on this goal, let me tell you about what is on my mind as we head into the next month of the campaign. There are a lot of promising signs pointing to our ability to flip Texas blue next year. Just this week, a Trump-backed congressional candidate was defeated in a special election. Democrats' infrastructure bill was poised to move forward in Congress. All of the signs point to an overwhelming rejection of Trump's agenda -- and an embrace of key Democratic priorities. Today I joined hundreds at the Texas State Capitol for a voting rights rally. Together we stood up for our right to vote, and rallied against the GOP voter suppression machine that's targeting hard-working Texans. We’re not giving up here in Texas, and with your support we can do this! The truth is I don’t want to be in Congress to rubber-stamp whatever the corporate lobbyists want. I'm going to be an advocate on the things that matter to all of us here in the Austin area -- from single-payer healthcare to a national solution to the housing and homelessness crisis. Sometimes that may mean going against the grain. I won't be able to do that if I don't have a grassroots movement with me, which is why we've been so focused on launching this campaign with strength. The more you're able to support us early on, the more impact your support will have! = Here's a good link: = Thanks, Donna | = | = Donna Imam is a computer engineer and Democrat running for Congress in Austin, Texas. Right now Austin is represented by three right-wing GOP members due to gerrymandering. But since Texas is gaining two new districts in 2022, this is our best chance to change that. That's why, with only a couple hours to go until the deadline, we're turning to you and personally asking, Peter: Will you make a donation of any amount right now so we can hit our goal and fight back against the GOP's attempts to flip this seat? subject: I referred Dr. Fauci's lies to DOJ for criminal investigation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58050301:600vY_lNQ:m:1:3253819041:83F181ACAD295434B432446B321EF21E:r) | |
---
Peter, Dr. Fauci lied.

The NIH funded research in Wuhan that could have led to viruses like COVID-19.

_We've seen the paper trail. He can't run from reality with distracting language and fake ignorance._

That's what I told Fox News and it needs to be heard by everyone across this country.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58050301:600vY_lNQ:m:1:3253819041:83F181ACAD295434B432446B321EF21E:r)
When it comes down to it, we can't count on Dr. Fauci to come clean on his own.

He has a self interest in covering up the whole thing.

**_But I'm not going to let him get away with it. _**

His lies are more than just destructive, they're actually criminal. And he must be held accountable immediately.

I've already urged the Department of Justice to act.

Help me put the pressure on by chipping in now: **[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-2641081/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58050301:600vY_lNQ:m:1:3253819041:83F181ACAD295434B432446B321EF21E:r)**

It's time to say enough is enough.
In Liberty,
Rand Paul

name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: My 2020 opponent entered the race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Last November, this grassroots team helped me narrowly defeat my Republican opponent. Now he’s back, and he has every intention of flipping this seat back into Republican hands next November. We cannot let that happen. Peter,

Last November, this grassroots team helped me narrowly defeat my Republican opponent. Now he’s back, and he has every intention of flipping this seat back into Republican hands next November. We cannot let that happen.

With him in the race, that makes two Trump-supporting Republicans running to defeat me next year.

Peter -- I always knew this race would be tough. I'm the first Democrat to ever represent Washington's 8th District, and the NRCC named our district a top target just weeks after I was sworn in to serve my second term.

National Republicans and my opponents know flipping my seat is their path to retake the House majority in the midterm elections. That means they'll do, say, and spend whatever it takes to defeat me. I need your help to hit our end-of-month fundraising goal before midnight tonight to ensure our grassroots team has the resources to win next year.

There are only a few hours left before this crucial deadline and we're still short of our goal. Can I count on your support to push us over the finish line? name: Maggie Hassan
subject: A new poll shows me down by one point
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
If I lose, Democrats will lose the Senate majority | | |
---
Folks, **a poll came out last week showing me down by one point to a potential opponent.** And in a swing state like New Hampshire, this could tip the scales toward the GOP. In 2016, I won by only 1,017 votes, beating the incumbent Republican in one of the closest races in history. And now, in 2022, experts are saying **New Hampshire is the most vulnerable Senate seat in the country.** If I lose, Democrats will lose our slim Senate majority -- affecting everything from health care protections to the fate of Roe v. Wade. With just hours until our crucial end-of-month deadline, I need your help. **[Can you please chip in $5 to protect this vulnerable Senate seat and our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33322127/298547853/-846459524?refcode=e20210731_mwh-poll&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWZhMmNhNy01ZmYyLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u2iAeiriXT7dvSbOb4dRpc3__i8uJWJotyRtsjXBW6U=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33322128/298547860/-846459524?refcode=e20210731_mwh-poll&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWZhMmNhNy01ZmYyLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u2iAeiriXT7dvSbOb4dRpc3__i8uJWJotyRtsjXBW6U=)

GOP extremism in our state is growing _rapidly_ , so our progressive movement has to grow, too – but with only hours until our critical monthly fundraising deadline, we're still $1,386 short of our goal.
**This could be the most important step you take today to defeat Republican extremism and secure a better future for Arizona, so I'm asking:[Please, will you donate any amount and seize your LAST CHANCE to give before our monthly deadline and flip Arizona blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33322279/298549503/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk162-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWI4Zjc1My02MGYyLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FehLt6-Efvx1iik4BzTrtTj51JwI1g4y3eVjjSK2UtM=)**
Arizona has become ground zero for the attacks on our democracy – to the extent that Trump and his biggest supporters literally believe our state's "audit" will overturn Joe Biden's victory in the 2020 election.

**Donald Trump himself even came here to Arizona this month to spread his lies in person! He and his backers couldn't be more wrong, but it doesn't mean they're not dangerous – and we know they'll spend MILLIONS to keep this state red and continue pushing their lies and conspiracy theories. That means we have to be able to fight back and stop their extremism from corrupting Arizona's future.**
And friend, we _can_ do it. We _can_ defeat this unbelievable GOP extremism, flip our state blue and secure a better future for Arizona families. Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight confirms this is a toss-up race for governor – which means we can win it. But we have to do it TOGETHER – and especially right now as our deadline looms, that means I'm counting on you.
**[Falling short now is out of the question, so please: Before you lose your chance at midnight tonight, can you donate $5 or more – whatever you can spare – to power this grassroots campaign to defeat GOP extremism and flip Arizona blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33322280/298549504/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk162-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWI4Zjc1My02MGYyLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FehLt6-Efvx1iik4BzTrtTj51JwI1g4y3eVjjSK2UtM=)**
_Muchas gracias,_

Marco
* * *
**Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. body:
I’ll make this quick
| | |

| | Hey Derek, it's Terry.

I know it’s late, but I wanted to get one last note out to you before our midnight deadline tonight.

My team and I have been working overtime to finish July strong because we know Glenn Youngkin is dramatically outspending us on TV.

A recent poll from a top-rated 538 pollster shows this race is tied. If we fail to reach our goal before midnight, we won’t be able to keep up.

Glenn Youngkin will pull ahead and Donald Trump will be a step closer to making his hand-picked guy Virginia’s next governor.

So Derek, I’m humbly asking you to make a small contribution to my campaign so we can keep fighting for the things that matter to Virginians.

**The path to victory in 2022 goes right through Wisconsin.**

Democrats are pounding the pavement and flooding the airwaves all across the state in an effort to protect their razor-thin majority. They’ve come out of the gates swinging, and they’re prepared to spend millions of dollars down the stretch to win votes here.

clean_body: | | | | We are stronger than them Friend, It’s been a little under four months since we launched our campaign to run for Senate in Alaska against Lisa Murkowski who will have been in office for TWENTY YEARS. And during this time the support Team Kelly has received from Alaskans and the Nation has been tremendous! President Trump Endorsed our campaign! The Alaska Republican Party Endorsed our Campaign! We’ve raised over $750,000 in less than 100 days! The polls are showing us up by 20 points! But we need to keep the momentum going. We have a critical End of the Month deadline approaching and we need your support so we can prove that we can DEFEAT the DC Insiders and RETIRE Murkowski! It’s our chance to prove that our Grassroots Conservative support is stronger than the DC Establishment! We are STRONGER and we will WIN! Thank you, Team Kelly www.kellyforak.com | | | | ==

subject: I don't want to waste your time
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Friends—

We all agree on this: Ron DeSantis needs to be a one-term governor.

So I have just one question: can you click here to chip in before midnight and help us defeat him next year? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-nf-july-eom]

Thanks!

Max Flugrath
Communications Director
Nikki Fried for Governor
Begin Forwarded Message:
From: Nikki Fried
Subject: Can I count on Max?
Date: July 31, 2021 at 11:01 AM
To: Max Flugrath
Friends—

I’m sorry to bother you on the weekend, but this is urgent. Stefanie and I just touched base, I wanted to give you an update on fundraising.

We’re still $2,901 short of our July fundraising goal.

I’m hoping I can count on you to help us close the gap, friends. If you’re in a position to give before midnight, please click here to chip in now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-nf-july-eom]

I’m worried, friends. We set these monthly goals to ensure we’ll have the resources to defeat Ron DeSantis next year. Staying on track is critical to executing our most aggressive campaign plan.

So team, I’m asking you directly. If you’re able, please click here to chip in before midnight and help us finish July strong. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-nf-july-eom]

With Gratitude,

Nikki

body:
#

Friends — we are going to be upfront with our ask — we are emailing for $5.
[**Click here if you don’t have time to read anymore but still want to chip in $5 to help us pass universal background checks >>**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-july21?refcode=em210731-2-15&t=1&refcode2=440_3935704_niFibV&akid=440%2E3935704%2EniFibV)
Our 10,000 contribution goal for our July fundraising deadline ends in just a few more hours and we need your help to close the gap before midnight.
$5 might not seem like a lot. But when you chip in $5, and the next person reading this email chips in $5 too, it gives us the resources to hit our goal and do our part. **So before tonight’s deadline we have to ask:**
[**If you are able, will you make a $5 donation today to help us hit our 10,000 contribution July fundraising goal? Your support, regardless of the amount, will go a long way towards helping us save lives.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-july21?refcode=em210731-2-15&t=2&refcode2=440_3935704_niFibV&akid=440%2E3935704%2EniFibV)

name: Senator Jacky Rosen
subject: why I’m asking:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
We have a must-win Senate race in Nevada this year, multiple Democratic incumbents to defend and exciting challengers who can help us expand the map -- and they’re all counting on our support.
#
Team,
We are on the brink of important progress in the Senate on so many crucial issues: infrastructure, climate change, caregiving and so much more.
But here’s the thing: no matter what we accomplish in the Senate this year, it could all be stripped away again if we don’t hold onto our Democratic majority.
We have a must-win Senate race in Nevada this year, multiple Democratic incumbents to defend and exciting challengers who can help us expand the map -- and they’re all counting on our support.

name: Senator Dick Durbin
subject: I know I can count on you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
Handing control of the Senate back to McConnell’s GOP is not an option we can afford. We need to do everything in our power to ensure Democrats are victorious next November.
#
Peter,
I’m working hard with my fellow Senate Democrats to make progress for the American people -- but at the same time, Republicans are working overtime to defeat us in the midterm elections.
Not only are they running attack ads against my colleagues in vulnerable seats, they’re trying to obstruct our work in the Senate. Mitch McConnell even shamefully attempted to block the critical investigation into the insurrection that occurred at the U.S. Capitol on January 6.
**Handing control of the Senate back to McConnell’s GOP is not an option we can afford.** We need to do everything in our power to ensure Democrats are victorious next November.
Right now, we’re so close to reaching our end-of-month fundraising goal, and I know I can count on you to help close the gap so we finish July with the resources we need to keep up the fight.
**[Peter, will you contribute you contribute $5 or anything you can before tonight’s deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33323940/298565746/-889631438?refcode=dd_em_210731_1_i&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGVmNWQxZi02OWYyLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NzojUtuGKdlSwQV4jC1ntz7nyn_IN4xmipxpu27EwFs=)**

subject: I know it’s late
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana
body:
We simply can’t sit back and watch for any longer. Democrats will be pulling out all the stops to defeat us across the nation and increase their power | [](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=581385ebb56f435d8ca3d2f2d985ecbd&_e=I2f8SZjHB1wnFQRCEAgyo2oKlFUeJQmsOorN4rEaSaXlbwOyc9uePu16r6lHY75MjqFvTgHSHktya9NjFmbXD0FfG0bOQQ5vv8Tyq8q3CJMb1E7mfE0OgcmViBrXYwcAFSq4Y_g2cJ-UcoXq-VLnx1PwlfKx8l4Cvs-3-rSFWn-0MuD66ugnvSNnpTbF6uat9W2zePnFP_6CaDVfCGuxhOSsWbdsjytxQ8ukoRzpE-YHWS70KmZSg0T2ApQAgWyx-wiEOPU5yimz1yxsdoMARzadBzMcTaZ9kMnuEQkuPLFyXeK2wu35tHSor079eRU-4bZ_FGpOvcfyTglSM9W1n2_i0XFpvyZGAjImsIdcCsMquhy-Ucgy_C9vFTR4-HLdseBv9yYTlx_heGu1EWZLNAVCOQdMqDRGazBaCQN50I26N-wrI1CV_KWZxHiddd1L)

subject: True the Vote Weekly Update | July 31, 2021
body:
Election Integrity News to Know | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7674ce0fd873/independence-day-newsletter-test-7232957?e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| |
---
|

### In politics, nothing happens by accident.
If it happens, you can bet it was planned that way.
\- President Franklin D. Roosevelt
---
| | July 31, 2021

Hi Friend!

I hope this weekend update finds you enjoying a beautiful summer day with family and friends.

The news we're sharing this week can make for a pretty heavy read. And really, it's not even the news itself that's tough, because once you are informed you can begin to deal with it. I think what's toughest is to read all this stuff, to listen, to cuss and discuss, but rarely feel like progress is being made. Real, tangible, positive traction has been hard to find.

Then you look at a group like True the Vote. We are a small but capable lot. We have always drawn fire, but we've never left our post. No matter how fierce the battle, we've remained standing. And for the past many months, despite the swirl of headlines around all things elections, we have remained very quiet.

We are, in fact, making real traction across a number of fronts. And as soon as we can, we will begin the release of it all. Part of what we'll share will be new tools to help with cleaning up your local voter rolls and organizing and training for 2022. But another part has to do with the release of information we've been developing for a very long time.

Maybe it would be better to say nothing all all. Mercy knows we've all had our fill of hollow promises. I'm sharing this now only because ... even though I can't divulge details ... I can tell you what we have is real. We have a plan and we are executing against it, every day.

So when you read the rest of this, just know, all is not lost. Far from it. Think of these newsletters as necessary background to help you prepare for the journey ahead.

We're all in this together - and working together we really can true the vote.

Ever onward -

---
|
---
| [ ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=cc0f363475&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
|
---
|
# MUST READS

**No Retreat, No Surrender ** This week [DOJ AG Merrick Garland issued a warning](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=690a1f5bf7&e=ad8cba7e98) of criminal prosecution to any who undertake election-related efforts viewed as "voter intimidation". What's more, the [DOJ issued two guidance documents ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=0bd6ecffb1&e=ad8cba7e98) telling states all kinds of things they're doing and planning to do regarding elections, including an admonition not assume that reverting to pre-pandemic voting procedures would be a safe harbor from potential legal challenges. We can all agree that laws should not be broken in the pursuit of election integrity. Let's hope that's what the DOJ meant to communicate. Further, let's hope that when the DOJ is presented with evidence of apparent criminal activity in elections, that they will enforce the law. Time will tell. **Action:** [Read the DOJ's filing ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=1505faf8d8&e=ad8cba7e98) against the state of Georgia. Knowledge is power.

**To Audit or Not to Audit?** As True the Vote has cautioned for months, reliving the 2020 election via rolling nationwide audits is a dangerous addiction. This week, PA Sen Daniel Laughlin [denounced the election audit ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=5172f5bd6e&e=ad8cba7e98) in his state. It's a bittersweet read, but an important perspective to consider. The hard fact is that American elections are rife with unwieldy, outdated, and unregulated processes that enable all manner of evaporable grift. If the goal of an audit is to study and reform the process, that's worth it. If the goal is to replay the election, time would be better spent in preparation for 2022; in determining never again to sit on the sidelines. **Action:** Commit to working in support of your local elections.[ Volunteer with True the Vote ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=e89147e217&e=ad8cba7e98) to be part of upcoming projects. We are building training and tools to make us all stronger. The only way way to restore election integrity is to work together, stay focused, and never forget what is at stake.

**Citizen Fluid **[This op-ed from the New York Times,](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=a12bef3839&e=ad8cba7e98) rallying for non-citizen voting. In case it's behind a paywall, here's a summary from [The Blaze:](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=35bb164d8c&e=ad8cba7e98) According to the Times, the essay is "_part of a series exploring bold ideas to revitalize and renew the American experiment." _Atossa Araxia Abrahamian, a New York-based progressive journalist and former senior editor of the Nation, claimed that "_it's time for Democrats to radically expand the electorate." _This isn't a new idea, mind you. The push for a borderless America has been in play for years - and in some local jurisdictions around the country, noncitizen voting is already allowed. **Action: **[Call your local e](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=0fc2dbf674&e=ad8cba7e98)[lection office](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=712efbb9a5&e=ad8cba7e98) and ask for information on the legality of noncitizen voting in your local elections. It's a simple but helpful step in educating yourself about your local process. What you learn may surprise you. _ _
---
|
---
|
##
Eyes On | Information Operations and the Fight for Election Integrity

For more than twenty years, the United States military and militaries of countries around the world have used “Information Operations” or IO’s as a way to “capture the hearts and minds” of the adversary and influence the population of a target to win the war. From Iraq to Afghanistan to Ukraine, we do it and do it well.

The purpose of IO’s is not to provide a perspective, opinion, or layout of a policy. It is defined as the ability to make audiences “think and act” in a manner favorable to the mission objectives. To “take action.” This is done by applying perception management techniques that target the audience's emotions, motives, and reasoning.

The same type of IO is being run here, in the United States – except it’s a "non-partisan" IO designed to protect the establishment, and to smash insurgents and those who seek to expose the corruption and criminal activity such as vote trafficking.

What we are witnessing today, with the failure of federal judges to even allow for the merits of legal challenges alleging voter fraud to be heard (which to be honest, we have sometimes scratched our heads at as well) or the suppression of evidence concerning election integrity is unconscionable and anti-American. The blacklisting of the Hunter Biden story and the de-platforming of then President Donald Trump are the result of a seismic IO that has been applied politically to the country's population.

Who’s responsible? It's hard to say definitively but we get closer to exposing them every day.

It's important to remember - the techniques used in an IO are not meant to foster debate. They are built to overwhelm and change the target’s psyche. Using these techniques, information sources can be manipulated and those that write, speak, or think counter to the objective are relegated as propaganda, ill-informed, or irrelevant. And if they are too powerful, they are targeted and “taken out.”

Sound familiar? For years now, True the Vote and other leaders who have worked to restore America’s confidence in our electoral system and urge the public to act, have been targeted and smeared in a very sophisticated, strategic, and coordinated effort. (As part of the True the Vote family, you should feel good and wear the smears as a badge of honor! You and the thousands of volunteers who define True the Vote have been effective and the attacks are to be expected). The smears and attacks are part of a long-term IO designed to silence and delegitimize effective groups that our opponents dismiss.

Early on, one of True the Vote’s loudest critics and attack dogs was Color of Change co-founder, Van Jones, who now has his own show on CNN. Last week, after he landed his rocket, America's wealthiest man, Jeff Bezos, awarded Jones $100M for “courage and civility.” Less than a week later, billionaire George Soros made a $1M donation to Color of Change, who’s primary campaign is to “defund the police.”

To be fair, recently, Jones has done good work to unite Republicans and Democrats in support of criminal justice reform. But early on as founder of Color of Change, Jones was one of the most divisive forces around when it came to election integrity, attacking True the Vote and other effective leading organizations. And as an African American leader, he played a key role in the Information Operation by smearing the organization to associate the desire for election integrity as somehow being racist.

To optimized an IO, it must be integrated into all forms of society - government, media, Big Tech, Hollywood, our educational platforms, and the judiciary.

Just think about this for a moment. When you see FOX News, top Congressional leadership in the Republican party, the FBI, CIA, and others in the intelligence community, and Big Tech all colluding to vilify and dismiss all election integrity criticism or inquiries, you can be sure that an Information Operation has been effective. It’s the same thing as the hysterical push for vaccinations around COVID-19 and the blacklisting of early treatment and medications like Ivermectin and monoclonal antibodies (that Trump took to recover).

One more example? Hunter Biden’s laptop. Glenn Greenwald, the Pulitzer Prize-winning journalist who broke the mass government domestic spying story when Edward Snowden blew the whistle, resigned from the media outlet he co-founded, the Intercept, because his editors wouldn’t even let him report on Hunter Biden!

When Trayvon Martin was shot a few years ago which gave rise to Black Lives Matter, the movement and its actions were treated as straight up news. But today, you can rarely find one negative story concerning the BLM movement despite the destruction to physical property and defacing of monuments and statues – some of those statues being actual Civil Rights champions!

Across the board, because of the power of this IO, journalists are no longer journalists and have abandoned all objectivity. They are activists and tools of the establishment. Judges are too afraid to challenge anything that will go against the grain of the establishment narrative. No one can utter anything challenging that narrative on social media without getting de-platformed, and the media blacklists everything from WikiLeaks to Early Treatment for COVID and dismisses those fighting for election integrity as baseless or conspiracy theory oriented.

Four our part at True the Vote, we have a few surprises in store for you that we are positioning to blow the lid off the whole operation. From FOIAs, to investigations, to a soon-to-be-announced data set, the fireworks are about to launch.

One thing is clear, at the end of the day, if we are going to sustain change and truly have election integrity, we need you and everyone to raise your voices and become part of the counter-op. After all, we are up against an Information Operation designed to make a population “think and act” a certain way. Let’s push back with the truth. Push back and do not stop.

name: John Fetterman
subject: V short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We're just hours away from our July fundraising deadline, but still a few hundred dollars shy of our $102,769 fundraising goal. 😐
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210731-2177-header&t=1&akid=2177%2E434096%2Eb2SeGX)
Peter, I promise I'll keep this *very* short:
We're just hours away from our July fundraising deadline, but still a few hundred dollars shy of our $102,769 fundraising goal. 😐
I've gotta ask since you haven't donated to our campaign this month yet and we’re running out of time:
**Will you please make your very first $5 donation to our grassroots campaign for U.S. Senate before midnight so we can finally hit our July fundraising goal and resume campaign operations?**
Here's a personal donation link you can use, or just click the button below: [** _https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20210731-dpwillis67@gmail.com_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25905?refcode=em20210731-2177&t=2&akid=2177%2E434096%2Eb2SeGX)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25905?refcode=em20210731-2177&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2177%2E434096%2Eb2SeGX)**
__
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/25905?refcode=em20210731-2177&t=22&akid=2177%2E434096%2Eb2SeGX)
Thank you, thank you, THANK YOU for all your support so far. I *know* that our team has what it takes to close the gap and finish July strong. 🙏
Let's do this!
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania __

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210731-2177-footer&t=23&refcode2=2177_434096_b2SeGX&akid=2177%2E434096%2Eb2SeGX)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=24&akid=2177%2E434096%2Eb2SeGX)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2177%2E434096%2Eb2SeGX)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: We keep emailing
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
On Thursday, Mark’s wife and former Congresswoman, Gabby Giffords, reached out to ask for your help because we can’t afford to fall short after Donald Trump flew to Arizona to hold a rally and directly attacked our campaign.
Then yesterday, we reached out again because we hadn’t brought in as many contributions as we’d hoped and we needed your help to turn things around.
And this morning, Mark reached out himself one last time because he knows how important hitting our 40,000 contribution goal is.
**So you’ve heard from Gabby and Mark personally and they know what’s on the line in the next few hours. So before time runs out, we have to humbly ask:**
[**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation to Mark’s people-powered campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our 40,000 contribution goal.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?refcode=em210731-2-15&t=1&refcode2=1092_6688874_artVEw&akid=1092%2E6688874%2EartVEw)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em210731-2-15&t=20&refcode2=1092_6688874_artVEw&akid=1092%2E6688874%2EartVEw)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210731-2-15&t=21&refcode2=1092_6688874_artVEw&akid=1092%2E6688874%2EartVEw)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210731-2-15&t=22&refcode2=1092_6688874_artVEw&akid=1092%2E6688874%2EartVEw)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210731-2-15&t=23&refcode2=1092_6688874_artVEw&akid=1092%2E6688874%2EartVEw)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210731-2-15&t=24&refcode2=1092_6688874_artVEw&akid=1092%2E6688874%2EartVEw)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210731-2-15&t=25&refcode2=1092_6688874_artVEw&akid=1092%2E6688874%2EartVEw)**
---
****
Thank you in advance for chipping in and for helping us hit this critical goal. Your support will give us the ability to fight back against whatever Trump and Mitch McConnell decide to throw at us next as we gear up to defend this seat in 2022.
Thank you again, we couldn’t do this without you!
Team Kelly

clean_body: Friends — On Thursday, Mark’s wife and former Congresswoman, Gabby Giffords, reached out to ask for your help because we can’t afford to fall short after Donald Trump flew to Arizona to hold a rally and directly attacked our campaign. Then yesterday, we reached out again because we hadn’t brought in as many contributions as we’d hoped and we needed your help to turn things around. And this morning, Mark reached out himself one last time because he knows how important hitting our 40,000 contribution goal is. So you’ve heard from Gabby and Mark personally and they know what’s on the line in the next few hours. So before time runs out, we have to humbly ask: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | Thank you in advance for chipping in and for helping us hit this critical goal. Your support will give us the ability to fight back against whatever Trump and Mitch McConnell decide to throw at us next as we gear up to defend this seat in 2022. Thank you again, we couldn’t do this without you! Team Kelly ** Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

name: Catherine Cortez Masto
subject: personally reaching out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
this is incredibly important, so I wanted to personally reach out. | | |
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGnTBJ8hNwqNQexWCh9SGmQT0T6Zcrnzy02idU4n2ObuQnLM5pTPMRotCk6mpbfZMRKwkbsKI9QmKE9tj_IvBx3zLfT0wEsq2LbJd7st9C0ye6k8c-Jd52zjniaFgUL3O5kTbuHEGkk3dOvBM1efcVgQf2js67A2Za1Vt0d4YZiZLAt-yXgoXqi7jfs7sePRwwzN-qmgIJhMSBxHNMV9lVi0vXqI7yHEW2TmShDdj_IuFYSJSZg2bXzCO6MEbgQCx6gF5tp9XlAXo-9nYT4G3xFE/3e2/ZB9UQ7XcQvirknUZOBduEA/h0/TRQI7JY-zk9fCGuoFKjwzg6uylFC9lNwidBOoJbS5IE) Derek, This is incredibly important, so I wanted to personally reach out. **My midnight deadline is just a few hours away,** and I’m still $1,456.20 short of our end-of-month goal. I'm hoping you can help us make up the gap before it's too late, but first I'll explain why reaching this goal is so critical.

Mitch McConnell and the GOP will stop at nothing to flip the Senate. They only need _one_ seat to do it, and with CNN naming me one the most vulnerable Democratic senators, Nevada is one of their top targets. Now, McConnell's handpicked candidate (a Trump-supporting extremist who election forecasters say _could win_) is _this close_ to entering the race against me.

The GOP and outside spending groups have _already_ spent nearly $1 million to defeat me. This is starting to feel a lot like 2016, when nearly _$50 million_ was spent to buy this seat. I managed to win by a slim two-point margin, and here's what that tough race taught me: **your grassroots support makes a critical difference.**

**That's why I'm urgently asking for your help before tonight's midnight deadline, Derek. My end-of-month fundraising numbers will be published for all to see, so this is our chance to show the GOP that our team has what it takes to keep Nevada blue and defend our Democratic Senate._Please, will you split a donation between my team and Common Good VA?_**

**[Split a donation $20 or more between my campaign and Common Good VA before the midnight deadline to meet this critical end-of-month goal, protect Nevada's Senate seat, and defend our Democratic Senate majority!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGnTBJ8hNwqNQexWCh9SGmQS_7QwFD1HM505wn2J4JE1P_YV9-SMHapZ1nLNSyIr0teNEQu-gkv32v7NdGVtcqM3CAsiVEyrBOdxH2mY2_MhvNbA8x7WBM2rpybqOWESnpDgUt801ctyzTyAISScSYLsZ0KBMyHO1noLultjHN1sYv_3WY1ar-nTGvtauI6dO7LhqhrAjpyk5FZuk5i11eBaXUv3HhfLT6fJhbxdl3FWP-rn1EjA10hyj8vYEJjNnCqpZZ-YVEpO3-zGQNTV42so/3e2/ZB9UQ7XcQvirknUZOBduEA/h1/LzOFdmRqDj_uYY5cxvv8HALv6jrv3YTeWx5lDxzUWBU)**

I can't thank you enough for helping us defend the Senate, Nevada, and our country. We can build back better thanks to dedicated grassroots supporters like you.

_¡La lucha sigue!_ The fight continues!

Catherine

**P.S. I really mean it when I say this grassroots team – including you – has the power to make or break this race.[With Senate control on the line, any amount you can donate to my campaign and Common Good VA before midnight will make a critical difference. Please, rush $10, $20 or whatever you can spare to win in Nevada and defend our Senate majority.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGnTBJ8hNwqNQexWCh9SGmQSGhkkgrjfLyUw51xgEcoAxfNmu7TlKUfFp5kdtrbVOW8_TFD0iR3CfgMrekEYgcu5qpgaAOYHj6YeDU_Ecxhy1HbXzwh5yyTiK6-oZEm9XwxFLaq9i5wbcSIGlOYyv9iFb-yVWxoCZLxBiCJdOYcFKPY9aNVtA_PYrzgcCvZtF4bCd-cQf-z3xApo9DXqltH7S6V1uYkT3nXhiOHyMJIIiouErJELfyJVZbaaAM6VzgJYKwrupsWklD73Z-oPvoxA/3e2/ZB9UQ7XcQvirknUZOBduEA/h2/FWENllryr65Let7V490lcLDxK1_Cfh884L5VMGDm3kY)**

name: Pramila Jayapal HQ
subject: 192 contributions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Will you be one of those supporters who we need to donate before midnight tonight?
#
Peter, some good news:
**We're currently 96% of the way to our July goal of 2,000 contributions!**
That’s 192 contributions away, to be exact — and if just one out of every three supporters reading this email were to chip in any amount right now, we’d hit our goal in no time. [**So,****Peter, will you be one of those supporters who we need to donate before midnight tonight?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210731?refcode=em20210731-509&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=509_420207_5pBmZo&akid=509%2E420207%2E5pBmZo)
**[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210731?refcode=em20210731-509&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=509_420207_5pBmZo&akid=509%2E420207%2E5pBmZo)**
When you make a donation to our movement, you're showing up for our urgent fight to push Congress to go big, bold, and fast on the next spending bill — _and that’s just scratching the surface._ Ending the filibuster, a wealth tax, a Green New Deal, expanding Medicare in the fight for Medicare for All, and raising the wage — those fights are more important than ever, as well.
Together we have achieved so much since Pramila was first elected to Congress in 2016, and together we'll continue to fight for transformative change. **Donations from emails like this one allow Pramila to focus on legislating and advocating for our progressive priorities instead of fundraising, so we have to ask one more time before midnight:**
[**If you can afford it at this time, can you donate $3 or any amount toward our end-of-month goal of 2,000 contributions so we can start August strong?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210731?refcode=em20210731-509&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=509_420207_5pBmZo&akid=509%2E420207%2E5pBmZo)
Thank you, as always, for being a part of this critical work.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210731-509-footer&t=23&refcode2=509_420207_5pBmZo&akid=509%2E420207%2E5pBmZo)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: one quick thing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
We have to keep the House blue in 2022.

| Hi team,

I’m sorry to bother you again on the weekend, but we only have a few hours left until our end-of-month fundraising deadline and we’re not quite on track to hit our goal of 1,000 donors.

It’s hard to believe I’ve been serving in Congress for 200 days now. These past seven months have flown by, but I’m so proud of the work we’ve done to pass historic legislation that protects the right to vote, ensures equal pay for equal work, fights for equal rights for the LGBTQ+ community, prioritizes criminal justice reform and gun safety, and so much more. I’m particularly proud that we passed the expanded and improved Child Tax Credit as part of the American Rescue Plan — a measure that is on track to cut childhood poverty in half.

If we’re going to keep making progress on these crucial issues, we have to keep the House blue in 2022. But with a small Democratic majority to begin with — combined with upcoming redistricting — we can’t afford to lose a single seat.

**Can you chip in any amount before our midnight deadline to ensure we have a strong campaign that’s ready for whatever comes our way? Here’s a secure link to donate now:[_sarajacobsforca.com/JulyGoal_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33325927/298568652/-182076786?refcode=BLU-SJC-20210731-2-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjcxZjZhYy03NmYyLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I2lr-rgfPaeUjykyIkZwKvCn8Eyd_7UrA6uTCKJ5ra8=)**

Thank you,

Sara Jacobs
