We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45388793&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA2MDAxNDc3OAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45388793&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA2MDAxNDc3OAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.
clean_body: | | | | | ---|--- We're just six hours away from our most important monthly deadline yet. And before time runs out, we need you to understand: This is a critical moment. Trump and his Republicans have pledged to do everything they can to DESTROY our House Majority: Now, they 've SHATTERED four fundraising records in a rowto do just that --and are armed with $11 MILLION more than our Democrats! Trump has hinged his next presidential run on destroying our House Majority, and he and his Republicans will stop at nothing to retake power. If we don't hit tonight's End of Month goal, we risk not being able to defend our House Democrats from the Republicans and their mega donors. NO!! So this is your FINAL JULY MEMBERSHIP NOTICE before tonight's End of Month deadline. Quickly -- will you rush in your first $3 of the month to STOP Republicans from buying their way back to power, DEFEND our House Majority, and ELECT strong House Democrats? | If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | Thanks, DCCC Please note: July Democratic Membership status is based on contributions from dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you 've given through another email, contributed recently, or supported our campaign through another means, we're so grateful for your Membership during these unprecedented times._ Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

Derek — this isn’t the news we were hoping to share, especially after the amazing month we just had, but Terry said we could reach out because you might want to see this. CNN released an article titled **"The 10 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022"** ....and we are on the list. Here’s a paragraph from the article on our race: _“Republicans are no longer without candidates to take on Democratic Sen. Mark Kelly, who is running for a full six-year term after winning last fall.”_ We made Arizona history when we won in 2020, but now Mark needs your help to hold this seat and fend off attacks from National Republicans. This is not the list we wanted to be on as we head into the election next year. So we’re reaching out for your help to raise $10,000 today in response to this news so we can stay ahead of the Republicans who want to defeat us. **** [**This is where you come in, Derek: If you are able, will you split a $15 donation between our people-powered campaign and Common Good? Articles like this make us a top target of Mitch McConnell and we need your help to prepare for the next wave of attack ads.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6FkvwaY4BDYvyW8TPm0aVjUYzzZSfaCWLeNOPKIXGUHHrVbQYnnGi_CdNX0e-hG6gyTDKU78bBe6vaUjo-Xp0Cto3hP7PigjM0QmCmYuENIEQJ7wg0K8jn231O4o1LugPaAVaKQNHuPYUPS33irMBDowNP4f5u6J7DvriMjP2lKsvsWT1v90lhyN8-pJUSv0Gi0uGT36Droqrcn4mruQUVS0etTjgRAiZIa_KbCGkhVwDtZhS9hRsUDEXnFeQRgGsamPgU6VwD7h75mP2UhyBZFo/3e2/txhIZykQS9Wp88Q_06faRg/h1/7mKjns2f1NXJ9i285JXaXz0TsPXRtA0PGrgE1HCGtQ4) You can bet that reports like this will only increase the attacks against us by National Republicans because they know if they can flip this seat they can take back the Senate. However, we know that with your help we can run another successful campaign in 2022 and hold this Arizona seat. So thank you in advance for pitching in and for having Mark’s back. Team Kelly

clean_body: | | | Derek — this isn’t the news we were hoping to share, especially after the amazing month we just had, but Terry said we could reach out because you might want to see this. CNN released an article titled "The 10 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022" ....and we are on the list. Here’s a paragraph from the article on our race: “Republicans are no longer without candidates to take on Democratic Sen. Mark Kelly, who is running for a full six-year term after winning last fall.” We made Arizona history when we won in 2020, but now Mark needs your help to hold this seat and fend off attacks from National Republicans. This is not the list we wanted to be on as we head into the election next year. So we’re reaching out for your help to raise $10,000 today in response to this news so we can stay ahead of the Republicans who want to defeat us. **** You can bet that reports like this will only increase the attacks against us by National Republicans because they know if they can flip this seat they can take back the Senate. However, we know that with your help we can run another successful campaign in 2022 and hold this Arizona seat. So thank you in advance for pitching in and for having Mark’s back. Team Kelly | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

name: Team AOC
subject: Deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Truthfully, this is a make-or-break moment for Democrats to deliver real change. We could use your help before our end of month deadline.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210731-2313-header&t=1&akid=2313%2E2526796%2EDBbi2U)
We’ll get straight to the point.
[We’re respectfully asking you to contribute $3 to Team AOC before tonight's big end-of-month deadline.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210730-2?refcode=em20210731-2313-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2313_2526796_DBbi2U&akid=2313%2E2526796%2EDBbi2U)
We know that not everyone is in a place to give today, and _that’s okay_. **But, if you are able to donate now, it will make an incredible difference. Because right now, this is a make-or-break moment for Democrats to deliver real change for working people.**
Alexandria is doing everything in her power to extend the rent moratorium and push for climate action in the big budget bill – including creating a Civilian Climate Corps and funding high speed rail. She’s pressing the Biden administration to cancel student debt. And she’s leading the charge for strong action to protect our voting rights and abolish the filibuster.
What strengthens Alexandria’s voice in these debates is the fact that there’s a multi-racial, multi-generational, multi-class movement fighting alongside her — and nowhere is that clearer than in our grassroots fundraising power. It’s critical that we start off the next month with the strongest momentum possible, and that’s why it’s so important that we hit this July goal by the deadline.
**If just one-in-ten of the people reading this note now are able to donate, we’d hit our end-of-month goal of 7,500 donations in no time. So we need to ask...**
[If you’re able to today, can you please make one of the last remaining $3 donations we need to hit our goal of 7,500 donations before tonight at midnight?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210730-2?refcode=em20210731-2313-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&refcode2=2313_2526796_DBbi2U&akid=2313%2E2526796%2EDBbi2U)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210730-2?refcode=em20210731-2313-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&refcode2=2313_2526796_DBbi2U&akid=2313%2E2526796%2EDBbi2U)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210730-2?refcode=em20210731-2313-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&refcode2=2313_2526796_DBbi2U&akid=2313%2E2526796%2EDBbi2U)**
The stronger our grassroots fundraising, the more power we have in Congress to push for serious change like a Green New Deal and canceling student debt. That’s one of the reasons that it’s so important we don’t miss goals like this one.
Thank you for considering making a donation today.
\- Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210730-2?refcode=em20210731-2313-P&t=24&refcode2=2313_2526796_DBbi2U&akid=2313%2E2526796%2EDBbi2U)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20210731-2313-P&t=25&akid=2313%2E2526796%2EDBbi2U)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=26&akid=2313%2E2526796%2EDBbi2U) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=27&akid=2313%2E2526796%2EDBbi2U) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=28&akid=2313%2E2526796%2EDBbi2U)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=29&akid=2313%2E2526796%2EDBbi2U)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=30&akid=2313%2E2526796%2EDBbi2U)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
